  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: //nolint:goconst\n2: package server\n3: \n4: import (\n5: \t\"context\"\n6: \t\"testing\"\n7: \n8: \t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n9: \t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n10: \t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n11: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n12: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n13: \tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n14: \t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n15: )\n16: \n17: func TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n18: \tvar (\n19: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n20: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n21: \t\ts      = &Server{\n22: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n23: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n24: \t\t}\n25: \t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n26: \t)\n27: \n28: \tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n29: \t\tKey:     req.Key,\n30: \t\tEnabled: true,\n31: \t}, nil)\n32: \n33: \tgot, err := s.GetFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n34: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n35: \n36: \tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n37: \tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", got.Key)\n38: \tassert.Equal(t, true, got.Enabled)\n39: }\n40: \n41: func TestListFlags_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n42: \tvar (\n43: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n44: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n45: \t\ts      = &Server{\n46: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n47: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n48: \t\t}\n49: \t)\n50: \n51: \tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n52: \n53: \tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n54: \t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n55: \t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n56: \t\t),\n57: \t)).Return(\n58: \t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n59: \t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n60: \t\t\t\t{\n61: \t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n62: \t\t\t\t},\n63: \t\t\t},\n64: \t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n65: \t\t}, nil)\n66: \n67: \tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n68: \n69: \tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n70: \t\tOffset: 10,\n71: \t})\n72: \n73: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n74: \n75: \tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n76: \tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n77: \tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n78: }\n79: \n80: func TestListFlags_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n81: \tvar (\n82: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n83: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n84: \t\ts      = &Server{\n85: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n86: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n87: \t\t}\n88: \t)\n89: \n90: \tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n91: \n92: \tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n93: \t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n94: \t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n95: \t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n96: \t\t),\n97: \t)).Return(\n98: \t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n99: \t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n100: \t\t\t\t{\n101: \t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n102: \t\t\t\t},\n103: \t\t\t},\n104: \t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n105: \t\t}, nil)\n106: \n107: \tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n108: \n109: \tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n110: \t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n111: \t\tOffset:    10,\n112: \t})\n113: \n114: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n115: \n116: \tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n117: \tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n118: \tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n119: }\n120: \n121: func TestCreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n122: \tvar (\n123: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n124: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n125: \t\ts      = &Server{\n126: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n127: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n128: \t\t}\n129: \t\treq = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n130: \t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n131: \t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n132: \t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n133: \t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n134: \t\t}\n135: \t)\n136: \n137: \tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n138: \t\tKey:         req.Key,\n139: \t\tName:        req.Name,\n140: \t\tDescription: req.Description,\n141: \t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n142: \t}, nil)\n143: \n144: \tgot, err := s.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n145: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n146: \n147: \tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n148: }\n149: \n150: func TestUpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n151: \tvar (\n152: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n153: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n154: \t\ts      = &Server{\n155: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n156: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n157: \t\t}\n158: \t\treq = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n159: \t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n160: \t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n161: \t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n162: \t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n163: \t\t}\n164: \t)\n165: \n166: \tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n167: \t\tKey:         req.Key,\n168: \t\tName:        req.Name,\n169: \t\tDescription: req.Description,\n170: \t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n171: \t}, nil)\n172: \n173: \tgot, err := s.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n174: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n175: \n176: \tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n177: }\n178: \n179: func TestDeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n180: \tvar (\n181: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n182: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n183: \t\ts      = &Server{\n184: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n185: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n186: \t\t}\n187: \t\treq = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n188: \t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n189: \t\t}\n190: \t)\n191: \n192: \tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n193: \n194: \tgot, err := s.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n195: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n196: \n197: \tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n198: }\n199: \n200: func TestCreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n201: \tvar (\n202: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n203: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n204: \t\ts      = &Server{\n205: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n206: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n207: \t\t}\n208: \t\treq = &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n209: \t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n210: \t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n211: \t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n212: \t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n213: \t\t}\n214: \t)\n215: \n216: \tstore.On(\"CreateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n217: \t\tId:          \"1\",\n218: \t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n219: \t\tKey:         req.Key,\n220: \t\tName:        req.Name,\n221: \t\tDescription: req.Description,\n222: \t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n223: \t}, nil)\n224: \n225: \tgot, err := s.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), req)\n226: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n227: \n228: \tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n229: }\n230: \n231: func TestUpdateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n232: \tvar (\n233: \t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n234: \t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n235: \t\ts      = &Server{\n236: \t\t\tlogger: logger,\n237: \t\t\tstore:  store,\n238: \t\t}\n239: \t\treq = &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n240: \t\t\tId:          \"1\",\n241: \t\t\tFlagKey:     \"flagKey\",\n242: \t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n243: \t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n244: \t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n245: \t\t}\n246: \t)\n247: \n248: \tstore.On(\"UpdateVariant\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Variant{\n249: \t\tId:          req.Id,\n250: \t\tFlagKey:     req.FlagKey,\n251: \t\tKey:         req.Key,\n252: \t\tName:        req.Name,\n253: \t\tDescription: req.Description,\n254: \t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n255: \t}, nil)\n256: \n257: \tgot, err := s.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), req)\n258: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n259: \n260: \tassert.NotNil(t, 29. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "package storage\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"path\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// DefaultListLimit is the default limit applied to any list operation page size when one is not provided.\n\tDefaultListLimit uint64 = 25\n\n\t// MaxListLimit is the upper limit applied to any list operation page size.\n\tMaxListLimit uint64 = 100\n)\n\n// EvaluationRule represents a rule and constraints required for evaluating if a\n// given flagKey matches a segment\ntype EvaluationRule struct {\n\tID              string                        `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tNamespaceKey    string                        `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tFlagKey         string                        `json:\"flag_key,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n\tRank            int32                         `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segmentOperator,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype EvaluationSegment struct {\n\tSegmentKey  string                 `json:\"segment_key,omitempty\"`\n\tMatchType   flipt.MatchType        `json:\"match_type,omitempty\"`\n\tConstraints []EvaluationConstraint `json:\"constraints,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationRollout represents a rollout in the form that helps with evaluation.\ntype EvaluationRollout struct {\n\tNamespaceKey string            `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tRolloutType  flipt.RolloutType `json:\"rollout_type,omitempty\"`\n\tRank         int32             `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tThreshold    *RolloutThreshold `json:\"threshold,omitempty\"`\n\tSegment      *RolloutSegment   `json:\"segment,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutThreshold represents Percentage(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutThreshold struct {\n\tPercentage float32 `json:\"percentage,omitempty\"`\n\tValue      bool    `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutSegment represents Segment(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutSegment struct {\n\tValue           bool                          `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segment_operator,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationConstraint represents a segment constraint that is used for evaluation\ntype EvaluationConstraint struct {\n\tID       string               `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tType     flipt.ComparisonType `json:\"comparison_type,omitempty\"`\n\tProperty string               `json:\"property,omitempty\"`\n\tOperator string               `json:\"operator,omitempty\"`\n\tValue    string               `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationDistribution represents a rule distribution along with its variant for evaluation\ntype EvaluationDistribution struct {\n\tID                string\n\tRuleID            string\n\tVariantID         string\n\tRollout           float32\n\tVariantKey        string\n\tVariantAttachment string\n}\n\ntype QueryParams struct {\n\tLimit     uint64\n\tOffset    uint64 // deprecated\n\tPageToken string\n\tOrder     Order // not exposed to the user yet\n}\n\n// Normalize adjusts query parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\nfunc (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n\t}\n\n\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n\t}\n}\n\ntype QueryOption func(p *QueryParams)\n\nfunc NewQueryParams(opts ...QueryOption) (params QueryParams) {\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(&params)\n\t}\n\n\t// NOTE(georgemac): I wanted to normalize under all circumstances\n\t// However, for legacy reasons the core flag state APIs expect\n\t// the default limit to be == 0. Normalize sets it to the default\n\t// constant which is > 0.\n\t// If we ever break this contract then we can normalize here.\n\t// params.Normalize()\n\n\treturn params\n}\n\nfunc WithLimit(limit uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Limit = limit\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithOffset(offset uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Offset = offset\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithPageToken(pageToken string) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.PageToken = pageToken\n\t}\n}\n\ntype Order uint8\n\nconst (\n\tOrderAsc Order = iota\n\tOrderDesc\n)\n\nfunc (o Order) String() string {\n\tswitch o {\n\tcase OrderAsc:\n\t\treturn \"ASC\"\n\tcase OrderDesc:\n\t\treturn \"DESC\"\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc WithOrder(order Order) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Order = order\n\t}\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyStore is a storage implementation which only supports\n// reading the various types of state configuring within Flipt\ntype ReadOnlyStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\n// Store supports reading and writing all the resources within Flipt\ntype Store interface {\n\tNamespaceStore\n\tFlagStore\n\tSegmentStore\n\tRuleStore\n\tRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\ntype ResultSet[T any] struct {\n\tResults       []T    `json:\"results\"`\n\tNextPageToken string `json:\"next_page_token\"`\n}\n\nconst DefaultNamespace = \"default\"\n\n// EvaluationStore returns data necessary for evaluation\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\t// GetEvaluationRules returns rules applicable to flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rules MUST be returned in order by Rank\n\tGetEvaluationRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRule, error)\n\tGetEvaluationDistributions(ctx context.Context, rule IDRequest) ([]*EvaluationDistribution, error)\n\t// GetEvaluationRollouts returns rollouts applicable to namespaceKey + flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rollouts MUST be returned in order by rank\n\tGetEvaluationRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRollout, error)\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyNamespaceStore support retrieval of namespaces only\ntype ReadOnlyNamespaceStore interface {\n\tGetNamespace(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tListNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace], error)\n\tCountNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req ReferenceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// NamespaceStore stores and retrieves namespaces\ntype NamespaceStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tCreateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tUpdateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tDeleteNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteNamespaceRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyFlagStore supports retrieval of flags\ntype ReadOnlyFlagStore interface {\n\tGetFlag(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tCountFlags(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// FlagStore stores and retrieves flags and variants\ntype FlagStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tCreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tUpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tDeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error\n\tCreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tUpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tDeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlySegmentStore supports retrieval of segments and constraints\ntype ReadOnlySegmentStore interface {\n\tGetSegment(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error)\n\tCountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// SegmentStore stores and retrieves segments and constraints\ntype SegmentStore interface {\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tCreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tUpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tDeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error\n\tCreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tUpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tDeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRuleStore supports retrieval of rules and distributions\ntype ReadOnlyRuleStore interface {\n\tGetRule(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tListRules(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rule], error)\n\tCountRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RuleStore stores and retrieves rules and distributions\ntype RuleStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tCreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tUpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tDeleteRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRuleRequest) error\n\tOrderRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRulesRequest) error\n\tCreateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tUpdateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tDeleteDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRolloutStore supports retrieval of rollouts\ntype ReadOnlyRolloutStore interface {\n\tGetRollout(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tListRollouts(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout], error)\n\tCountRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RolloutStore supports storing and retrieving rollouts\ntype RolloutStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tCreateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tUpdateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tDeleteRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest) error\n\tOrderRollouts(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest) error\n}\n\n// ListRequest is a generic container for the parameters required to perform a list operation.\n// It contains a generic type T intended for a list predicate.\n// It also contains a QueryParams object containing pagination constraints.\ntype ListRequest[P any] struct {\n\tPredicate   P\n\tQueryParams QueryParams\n}\n\n// ListOption is a function which can configure a ListRequest.\ntype ListOption[T any] func(*ListRequest[T])\n\n// ListWithQueryParamOptions takes a set of functional options for QueryParam and returns a ListOption\n// which applies them in order on the provided ListRequest.\nfunc ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// PageParameter is any type which exposes limit and page token\n// accessors used to identify pages.\ntype PageParameter interface {\n\tGetLimit() int32\n\tGetPageToken() string\n}\n\n// OffsetPageParameter is a type which exposes an additional offset\n// accessor for legacy paging implementations (page token supersedes).\ntype OffsetPageParameter interface {\n\tPageParameter\n\tGetOffset() int32\n}\n\n// ListWithParameters constructs a new ListRequest using the page parameters\n// exposed by the provided PageParameter implementation.\nfunc ListWithParameters[T any](t T, p PageParameter) *ListRequest[T] {\n\topts := []QueryOption{\n\t\tWithLimit(uint64(p.GetLimit())),\n\t\tWithPageToken(p.GetPageToken()),\n\t}\n\n\tif po, ok := p.(OffsetPageParameter); ok {\n\t\topts = append(opts, WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n\t}\n\n\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n}\n\n// ListWithOptions constructs a new ListRequest using the provided ListOption.\nfunc ListWithOptions[T any](t T, opts ...ListOption[T]) *ListRequest[T] {\n\treq := &ListRequest[T]{\n\t\tPredicate: t,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(req)\n\t}\n\n\treturn req\n}\n\n// Reference is a string which can refer to either a concrete\n// revision or it can be an indirect named reference.\ntype Reference string\n\n// ReferenceRequest is used to identify a request predicated solely by a revision reference.\n// This is primarily used for namespaces as it is the highest level domain model.\ntype ReferenceRequest struct {\n\tReference\n}\n\n// WithReference sets the provided reference identifier on a *ReferenceRequest.\nfunc WithReference(ref string) containers.Option[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ReferenceRequest) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// ListWithReference is a ListOption constrained to ReferenceRequest types.\n// It sets the reference on the resulting list request.\nfunc ListWithReference(ref string) ListOption[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Predicate.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// NamespaceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly beneath them (e.g. flags and segments).\ntype NamespaceRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tkey string\n}\n\n// NewNamespace constructs a *NamespaceRequest from the provided key string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewNamespace(key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) NamespaceRequest {\n\tp := NamespaceRequest{key: key}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn n.Namespace()\n}\n\n// Namespace returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) Namespace() string {\n\tif n.key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\treturn n.key\n}\n\n// ResourceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by revision, namespace and a key.\n// This is used for core resources (e.g. flag and segment) as well as to list sub-resources (e.g. rules and constraints).\ntype ResourceRequest struct {\n\tNamespaceRequest\n\tKey string\n}\n\n// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns a representation of the combined resource namespace and key separated by a '/'.\nfunc (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n}\n\n// IDRequest is used to identify any sub-resources which have a unique random identifier.\n// This is used for sub-resources with no key identifiers (e.g. rules and rollouts).\ntype IDRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tID string\n}\n\n// NewID constructs and configures a new *IDRequest with the provided ID string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewID(id string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) IDRequest {\n\tp := IDRequest{ID: id}\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\treturn p\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "package storage\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"path\"\n\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nconst (\n\t// DefaultListLimit is the default limit applied to any list operation page size when one is not provided.\n\tDefaultListLimit uint64 = 25\n\n\t// MaxListLimit is the upper limit applied to any list operation page size.\n\tMaxListLimit uint64 = 100\n)\n\n// EvaluationRule represents a rule and constraints required for evaluating if a\n// given flagKey matches a segment\ntype EvaluationRule struct {\n\tID              string                        `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tNamespaceKey    string                        `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tFlagKey         string                        `json:\"flag_key,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n\tRank            int32                         `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segmentOperator,omitempty\"`\n}\n\ntype EvaluationSegment struct {\n\tSegmentKey  string                 `json:\"segment_key,omitempty\"`\n\tMatchType   flipt.MatchType        `json:\"match_type,omitempty\"`\n\tConstraints []EvaluationConstraint `json:\"constraints,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationRollout represents a rollout in the form that helps with evaluation.\ntype EvaluationRollout struct {\n\tNamespaceKey string            `json:\"namespace_key,omitempty\"`\n\tRolloutType  flipt.RolloutType `json:\"rollout_type,omitempty\"`\n\tRank         int32             `json:\"rank,omitempty\"`\n\tThreshold    *RolloutThreshold `json:\"threshold,omitempty\"`\n\tSegment      *RolloutSegment   `json:\"segment,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutThreshold represents Percentage(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutThreshold struct {\n\tPercentage float32 `json:\"percentage,omitempty\"`\n\tValue      bool    `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// RolloutSegment represents Segment(s) for use in evaluation.\ntype RolloutSegment struct {\n\tValue           bool                          `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n\tSegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:\"segment_operator,omitempty\"`\n\tSegments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:\"segments,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationConstraint represents a segment constraint that is used for evaluation\ntype EvaluationConstraint struct {\n\tID       string               `json:\"id,omitempty\"`\n\tType     flipt.ComparisonType `json:\"comparison_type,omitempty\"`\n\tProperty string               `json:\"property,omitempty\"`\n\tOperator string               `json:\"operator,omitempty\"`\n\tValue    string               `json:\"value,omitempty\"`\n}\n\n// EvaluationDistribution represents a rule distribution along with its variant for evaluation\ntype EvaluationDistribution struct {\n\tID                string\n\tRuleID            string\n\tVariantID         string\n\tRollout           float32\n\tVariantKey        string\n\tVariantAttachment string\n}\n\ntype QueryParams struct {\n\tLimit     uint64\n\tOffset    uint64 // deprecated\n\tPageToken string\n\tOrder     Order // not exposed to the user yet\n}\n\n// Normalize adjusts query parameters within the enforced boundaries.\n// For example, limit is adjusted to be in the range (0, max].\n// Given the limit is not supplied (0) it is set to the default limit.\nfunc (q *QueryParams) Normalize() {\n\tif q.Limit == 0 {\n\t\tq.Limit = DefaultListLimit\n\t}\n\n\tif q.Limit > MaxListLimit {\n\t\tq.Limit = MaxListLimit\n\t}\n}\n\ntype QueryOption func(p *QueryParams)\n\nfunc NewQueryParams(opts ...QueryOption) (params QueryParams) {\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(&params)\n\t}\n\n\t// NOTE(georgemac): I wanted to normalize under all circumstances\n\t// However, for legacy reasons the core flag state APIs expect\n\t// the default limit to be == 0. Normalize sets it to the default\n\t// constant which is > 0.\n\t// If we ever break this contract then we can normalize here.\n\t// params.Normalize()\n\n\treturn params\n}\n\nfunc WithLimit(limit uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Limit = limit\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithOffset(offset uint64) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Offset = offset\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc WithPageToken(pageToken string) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.PageToken = pageToken\n\t}\n}\n\ntype Order uint8\n\nconst (\n\tOrderAsc Order = iota\n\tOrderDesc\n)\n\nfunc (o Order) String() string {\n\tswitch o {\n\tcase OrderAsc:\n\t\treturn \"ASC\"\n\tcase OrderDesc:\n\t\treturn \"DESC\"\n\t}\n\treturn \"\"\n}\n\nfunc WithOrder(order Order) QueryOption {\n\treturn func(p *QueryParams) {\n\t\tp.Order = order\n\t}\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyStore is a storage implementation which only supports\n// reading the various types of state configuring within Flipt\ntype ReadOnlyStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\n// Store supports reading and writing all the resources within Flipt\ntype Store interface {\n\tNamespaceStore\n\tFlagStore\n\tSegmentStore\n\tRuleStore\n\tRolloutStore\n\tEvaluationStore\n\tfmt.Stringer\n}\n\ntype ResultSet[T any] struct {\n\tResults       []T    `json:\"results\"`\n\tNextPageToken string `json:\"next_page_token\"`\n}\n\nconst DefaultNamespace = \"default\"\n\n// EvaluationStore returns data necessary for evaluation\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\t// GetEvaluationRules returns rules applicable to flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rules MUST be returned in order by Rank\n\tGetEvaluationRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRule, error)\n\tGetEvaluationDistributions(ctx context.Context, rule IDRequest) ([]*EvaluationDistribution, error)\n\t// GetEvaluationRollouts returns rollouts applicable to namespaceKey + flagKey provided\n\t// Note: Rollouts MUST be returned in order by rank\n\tGetEvaluationRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) ([]*EvaluationRollout, error)\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyNamespaceStore support retrieval of namespaces only\ntype ReadOnlyNamespaceStore interface {\n\tGetNamespace(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tListNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace], error)\n\tCountNamespaces(ctx context.Context, req ReferenceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// NamespaceStore stores and retrieves namespaces\ntype NamespaceStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyNamespaceStore\n\tCreateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tUpdateNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateNamespaceRequest) (*flipt.Namespace, error)\n\tDeleteNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteNamespaceRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyFlagStore supports retrieval of flags\ntype ReadOnlyFlagStore interface {\n\tGetFlag(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tCountFlags(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// FlagStore stores and retrieves flags and variants\ntype FlagStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyFlagStore\n\tCreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tUpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error)\n\tDeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error\n\tCreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tUpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error)\n\tDeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlySegmentStore supports retrieval of segments and constraints\ntype ReadOnlySegmentStore interface {\n\tGetSegment(ctx context.Context, req ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[NamespaceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error)\n\tCountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// SegmentStore stores and retrieves segments and constraints\ntype SegmentStore interface {\n\tReadOnlySegmentStore\n\tCreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tUpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error)\n\tDeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error\n\tCreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tUpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error)\n\tDeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRuleStore supports retrieval of rules and distributions\ntype ReadOnlyRuleStore interface {\n\tGetRule(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tListRules(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rule], error)\n\tCountRules(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RuleStore stores and retrieves rules and distributions\ntype RuleStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRuleStore\n\tCreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tUpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error)\n\tDeleteRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRuleRequest) error\n\tOrderRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRulesRequest) error\n\tCreateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tUpdateDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest) (*flipt.Distribution, error)\n\tDeleteDistribution(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest) error\n}\n\n// ReadOnlyRolloutStore supports retrieval of rollouts\ntype ReadOnlyRolloutStore interface {\n\tGetRollout(ctx context.Context, ns NamespaceRequest, id string) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tListRollouts(ctx context.Context, req *ListRequest[ResourceRequest]) (ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout], error)\n\tCountRollouts(ctx context.Context, flag ResourceRequest) (uint64, error)\n}\n\n// RolloutStore supports storing and retrieving rollouts\ntype RolloutStore interface {\n\tReadOnlyRolloutStore\n\tCreateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tUpdateRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest) (*flipt.Rollout, error)\n\tDeleteRollout(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteRolloutRequest) error\n\tOrderRollouts(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest) error\n}\n\n// ListRequest is a generic container for the parameters required to perform a list operation.\n// It contains a generic type T intended for a list predicate.\n// It also contains a QueryParams object containing pagination constraints.\ntype ListRequest[P any] struct {\n\tPredicate   P\n\tQueryParams QueryParams\n}\n\n// ListOption is a function which can configure a ListRequest.\ntype ListOption[T any] func(*ListRequest[T])\n\n// ListWithQueryParamOptions takes a set of functional options for QueryParam and returns a ListOption\n// which applies them in order on the provided ListRequest.\nfunc ListWithQueryParamOptions[T any](opts ...QueryOption) ListOption[T] {\n\treturn func(r *ListRequest[T]) {\n\t\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\t\topt(&r.QueryParams)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// PageParameter is any type which exposes limit and page token\n// accessors used to identify pages.\ntype PageParameter interface {\n\tGetLimit() int32\n\tGetPageToken() string\n}\n\n// OffsetPageParameter is a type which exposes an additional offset\n// accessor for legacy paging implementations (page token supersedes).\ntype OffsetPageParameter interface {\n\tPageParameter\n\tGetOffset() int32\n}\n\n// ListWithParameters constructs a new ListRequest using the page parameters\n// exposed by the provided PageParameter implementation.\nfunc ListWithParameters[T any](t T, p PageParameter) *ListRequest[T] {\n\topts := []QueryOption{\n\t\tWithLimit(uint64(p.GetLimit())),\n\t\tWithPageToken(p.GetPageToken()),\n\t}\n\n\tif po, ok := p.(OffsetPageParameter); ok {\n\t\topts = append(opts, WithOffset(uint64(po.GetOffset())))\n\t}\n\n\treturn ListWithOptions[T](t, ListWithQueryParamOptions[T](opts...))\n}\n\n// ListWithOptions constructs a new ListRequest using the provided ListOption.\nfunc ListWithOptions[T any](t T, opts ...ListOption[T]) *ListRequest[T] {\n\treq := &ListRequest[T]{\n\t\tPredicate: t,\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, opt := range opts {\n\t\topt(req)\n\t}\n\n\treturn req\n}\n\n// Reference is a string which can refer to either a concrete\n// revision or it can be an indirect named reference.\ntype Reference string\n\n// ReferenceRequest is used to identify a request predicated solely by a revision reference.\n// This is primarily used for namespaces as it is the highest level domain model.\ntype ReferenceRequest struct {\n\tReference\n}\n\n// WithReference sets the provided reference identifier on a *ReferenceRequest.\nfunc WithReference(ref string) containers.Option[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ReferenceRequest) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// ListWithReference is a ListOption constrained to ReferenceRequest types.\n// It sets the reference on the resulting list request.\nfunc ListWithReference(ref string) ListOption[ReferenceRequest] {\n\treturn func(rp *ListRequest[ReferenceRequest]) {\n\t\tif ref != \"\" {\n\t\t\trp.Predicate.Reference = Reference(ref)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// NamespaceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by both a revision and a namespace.\n// This is used to identify namespaces and list resources directly beneath them (e.g. flags and segments).\ntype NamespaceRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tkey string\n}\n\n// NewNamespace constructs a *NamespaceRequest from the provided key string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewNamespace(key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) NamespaceRequest {\n\tp := NamespaceRequest{key: key}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn n.Namespace()\n}\n\n// Namespace returns the resolved target namespace key string.\n// If the underlying key is the empty string, the default namespace (\"default\")\n// is returned instead.\nfunc (n NamespaceRequest) Namespace() string {\n\tif n.key == \"\" {\n\t\treturn flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\treturn n.key\n}\n\n// ResourceRequest is used to identify a request predicated by revision, namespace and a key.\n// This is used for core resources (e.g. flag and segment) as well as to list sub-resources (e.g. rules and constraints).\ntype ResourceRequest struct {\n\tNamespaceRequest\n\tKey string\n}\n\n// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {\n\tp := ResourceRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{\n\t\t\tkey: ns,\n\t\t},\n\t\tKey: key,\n\t}\n\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\n\treturn p\n}\n\n// String returns a representation of the combined resource namespace and key separated by a '/'.\nfunc (p ResourceRequest) String() string {\n\treturn path.Join(p.Namespace(), p.Key)\n}\n\n// IDRequest is used to identify any sub-resources which have a unique random identifier.\n// This is used for sub-resources with no key identifiers (e.g. rules and rollouts).\ntype IDRequest struct {\n\tReferenceRequest\n\tID string\n}\n\n// NewID constructs and configures a new *IDRequest with the provided ID string.\n// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.\nfunc NewID(id string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) IDRequest {\n\tp := IDRequest{ID: id}\n\tcontainers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)\n\treturn p\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/storage/storage.go",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
30. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/evaluation.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\trpcevaluation \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.\n// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.\nfunc (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tresp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) variant(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar reason rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason\n\n\tswitch resp.Reason {\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tcase flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_UNKNOWN_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t}\n\n\tver := &rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:         r.RequestId,\n\t\tMatch:             resp.Match,\n\t\tReason:            reason,\n\t\tVariantKey:        resp.Value,\n\t\tVariantAttachment: resp.Attachment,\n\t\tFlagKey:           resp.FlagKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif len(resp.SegmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\tver.SegmentKeys = resp.SegmentKeys\n\t}\n\n\treturn ver, nil\n}\n\n// Boolean evaluates a request for a boolean flag and entity.\nfunc (s *Server) Boolean(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.boolean(ctx, flag, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(strconv.FormatBool(resp.Enabled)),\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"boolean\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) boolean(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\trollouts, err := s.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, flag.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tresp = &rpcevaluation.BooleanEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\tRequestId: r.RequestId,\n\t\t}\n\t\tlastRank int32\n\t)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.Bool(resp.Enabled),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"boolean\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tfor _, rollout := range rollouts {\n\t\tif rollout.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"rollout rank: %d detected out of order\", rollout.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rollout.Rank\n\n\t\tif rollout.Threshold != nil {\n\t\t\t// consistent hashing based on the entity id and flag key.\n\t\t\thash := crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(r.EntityId + r.FlagKey))\n\n\t\t\tnormalizedValue := float32(int(hash) % 100)\n\n\t\t\t// if this case does not hold, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\tif normalizedValue < rollout.Threshold.Percentage {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Threshold.Value\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"threshold based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.String(\"rollout_type\", \"threshold\"))\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else if rollout.Segment != nil {\n\n\t\t\tvar (\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches = 0\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys    = []string{}\n\t\t\t)\n\n\t\t\tfor k, v := range rollout.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := s.evaluator.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t// if we don't match the segment, fall through to the next rollout.\n\t\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tswitch rollout.Segment.SegmentOperator {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\t\tif len(rollout.Segment.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Enabled = rollout.Segment.Value\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\t\t\ts.logger.Debug(\"segment based matched\", zap.Int(\"rank\", int(rollout.Rank)), zap.Strings(\"segments\", segmentKeys))\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// If we have exhausted all rollouts and we still don't have a match, return flag enabled value.\n\tresp.Reason = rpcevaluation.EvaluationReason_DEFAULT_EVALUATION_REASON\n\tresp.Enabled = flag.Enabled\n\tresp.FlagKey = flag.Key\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"default rollout matched\", zap.Bool(\"enabled\", flag.Enabled))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// Batch takes in a list of *evaluation.EvaluationRequest and returns their respective responses.\nfunc (s *Server) Batch(ctx context.Context, b *rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tresp := &rpcevaluation.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(b.Requests)),\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range b.GetRequests() {\n\t\tf, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(b.Reference)))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_ERROR_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_ErrorResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tErrorResponse: &rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tReason:       rpcevaluation.ErrorEvaluationReason_NOT_FOUND_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch f.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.boolean(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_BOOLEAN_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_BooleanResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tBooleanResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\t\tres, err := s.variant(ctx, f, req)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\teresp := &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\t\t\tType: rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponseType_VARIANT_EVALUATION_RESPONSE_TYPE,\n\t\t\t\tResponse: &rpcevaluation.EvaluationResponse_VariantResponse{\n\t\t\t\t\tVariantResponse: res,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Responses = append(resp.Responses, eresp)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"unknown flag type: %s\", f.Type)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",

31. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId:    r.RequestId,\n\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\tEntityId:     r.EntityId,\n\t\tContext:      r.Context,\n\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeProviderName,\n\t}\n\n\tif resp != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.Value),\n\t\t)\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", resp))\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Server) batchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\tres := flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse{\n\t\tResponses: make([]*flipt.EvaluationResponse, 0, len(r.GetRequests())),\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should change this to a native batch query instead of looping through\n\t// each request individually\n\tfor _, req := range r.GetRequests() {\n\t\t// ensure all requests have the same namespace\n\t\tif req.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\t\treq.NamespaceKey = r.NamespaceKey\n\t\t} else if req.NamespaceKey != r.NamespaceKey {\n\t\t\treturn &res, errs.InvalidFieldError(\"namespace_key\", \"must be the same for all requests if specified\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, req.NamespaceKey, req.FlagKey))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\t\tif r.GetExcludeNotFound() && errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// TODO: we also need to validate each request, we should likely do this in the validation middleware\n\t\tf, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\t\tRequestId:    req.RequestId,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tEntityId:     req.EntityId,\n\t\t\tContext:      req.Context,\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: req.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\ts.logger.Error(\"error evaluating flag\", zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\treturn &res, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tf.RequestId = \"\"\n\t\tres.Responses = append(res.Responses, f)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &res, nil\n}\n",

\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity\nfunc (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tvar resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\n\t\tvar errnf errs.ErrNotFound\n\t\tif errors.As(err, &errnf) {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{\n\t\tRequestId: BatchEvaluate evaluates a request for multiple flags and entities\nfunc (s *Server) BatchEvaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.BatchEvaluationRequest) (*flipt.BatchEvaluationResponse, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"batch-evaluate\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = flipt.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tresp, err := s.batchEvaluate(ctx, r)\n\tif   "content": "package server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\n\tfliptotel \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\tempty \"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb\"\n)\n\n// GetFlag gets a flag\nfunc (s *Server) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get flag\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))\n\n\tspanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),\n\t\tfliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.Key),\n\t}\n\n\tif flag != nil {\n\t\tspanAttrs = append(spanAttrs, fliptotel.AttributeFlagEnabled.Bool(flag.Enabled))\n\t}\n\n\t// add otel attributes to span\n\tspan := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)\n\tspan.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get flag\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", flag))\n\treturn flag, err\n}\n\n// ListFlags lists all flags\nfunc (s *Server) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListFlagRequest) (*flipt.FlagList, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list flags\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.GetReference()))\n\tresults, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(ns, r))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp := flipt.FlagList{\n\t\tFlags: results.Results,\n\t}\n\n\ttotal, err := s.store.CountFlags(ctx, ns)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list flags\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n\treturn &resp, nil\n}\n\n// CreateFlag creates a flag\nfunc (s *Server) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create flag\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create flag\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", flag))\n\treturn flag, err\n}\n\n// UpdateFlag updates an existing flag\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update flag\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tflag, err := s.store.UpdateFlag(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update flag\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", flag))\n\treturn flag, err\n}\n\n// DeleteFlag deletes a flag\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete flag\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteFlag(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n\n// CreateVariant creates a variant\nfunc (s *Server) CreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", variant))\n\treturn variant, err\n}\n\n// UpdateVariant updates an existing variant\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tvariant, err := s.store.UpdateVariant(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update variant\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", variant))\n\treturn variant, err\n}\n\n// DeleteVariant deletes a variant\nfunc (s *Server) DeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) (*empty.Empty, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"delete variant\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\tif err := s.store.DeleteVariant(ctx, r); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\treturn &empty.Empty{}, nil\n}\n",

\"google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb\"\n)\n\n// GetRule gets a rule\nfunc (s *Server) GetRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\trule, err := s.store.GetRule(ctx,\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)),\n\t\tr.Id)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"get rule\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", rule))\n\treturn rule, err\n}\n\n// ListRules lists all rules for a flag\nfunc (s *Server) ListRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListRuleRequest) (*flipt.RuleList, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list rules\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference))\n\tresults, err := s.store.ListRules(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(flag, r))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp := flipt.RuleList{\n\t\tRules: results.Results,\n\t}\n\n\ttotal, err := s.store.CountRules(ctx, flag)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tresp.TotalCount = int32(total)\n\tresp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken\n\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"list rules\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", &resp))\n\treturn &resp, nil\n}\n\n// CreateRule creates a rule\nfunc (s *Server) CreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create rule\", zap.Stringer(\"request\", r))\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(ctx, r)\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"create rule\", zap.Stringer(\"response\", rule))\n\treturn rule, err\n}\n\n// UpdateRule updates an existing rule\nfunc (s *Server) UpdateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {\n\ts.logger.Debug(\"update rule\",
