  "content": "{\"content\":\"1: package data\\n2: \\n3: import (\\n4: \\t\\\"context\\\"\\n5: \\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n6: \\n7: \\t\\\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\\\"\\n8: \\tgrpc_middleware \\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\\\"\\n9: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\\\"\\n10: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\\\"\\n11: \\t\\\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\\\"\\n12: \\t\\\"go.uber.org/zap\\\"\\n13: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc\\\"\\n14: )\\n15: \\n16: type EvaluationStore interface {\\n17: \\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\\n18: \\tstorage.EvaluationStore\\n19: }\\n20: \\n21: type Server struct {\\n22: \\tlogger *zap.Logger\\n23: \\tstore  EvaluationStore\\n24: \\n25: \\tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\\n26: }\\n27: \\n28: func New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\\n29: \\treturn &Server{\\n30: \\t\\tlogger: logger,\\n31: \\t\\tstore:  store,\\n32: \\t}\\n33: }\\n34: \\n35: // RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\\n36: func (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\\n37: \\tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\\n38: }\\n39: \\n40: func toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\\n41: \\tswitch f {\\n42: \\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\\n43: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\\n44: \\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\\n45: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\\n46: \\t}\\n47: \\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\\n48: }\\n49: \\n50: func toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\\n51: \\tswitch s {\\n52: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\\n53: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\\n54: \\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\\n55: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\\n56: \\t}\\n57: \\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\\n58: }\\n59: \\n60: func toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\\n61: \\tswitch s {\\n62: \\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n63: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\\n64: \\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\\n65: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\\n66: \\t}\\n67: \\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\\n68: }\\n69: \\n70: func toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\\n71: \\tswitch c {\\n72: \\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n73: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n74: \\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n75: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n76: \\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n77: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n78: \\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n79: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n80: \\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\\n81: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n82: \\t}\\n83: \\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n84: }\\n85: \\n86: func toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\\n87: \\tswitch r {\\n88: \\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\\n89: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\\n90: \\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\\n91: \\t\\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\\n92: \\t}\\n93: \\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\\n94: }\\n95: \\n96: var supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\\\"1.38.0\\\")\\n97: \\n98: func (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\\n99: \\tvar (\\n100: \\t\\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\\n101: \\t\\treference    = r.Reference\\n102: \\t\\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\\n103: \\t\\t\\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\\n104: \\t\\t\\t\\tKey: namespaceKey,\\n105: \\t\\t\\t},\\n106: \\t\\t\\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\\n107: \\t\\t}\\n108: \\t\\tremaining              = true\\n109: \\t\\tnextPage               string\\n110: \\t\\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\\n111: \\t\\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\\n112: \\t)\\n113: \\n114: \\t//  flags/variants in batches\\n115: \\tfor remaining {\\n116: \\t\\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\\n117: \\t\\t\\tctx,\\n118: \\t\\t\\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\\n119: \\t\\t\\t\\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\\n120: \\t\\t\\t\\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\\n121: \\t\\t\\t),\\n122: \\t\\t)\\n123: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n124: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"getting flags: %w\\\", err)\\n125: \\t\\t}\\n126: \\n127: \\t\\tflags := res.Results\\n128: \\t\\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\\n129: \\t\\tremaining = nextPage != \\\"\\\"\\n130: \\n131: \\t\\tfor _, f := range flags {\\n132: \\t\\t\\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\\n133: \\t\\t\\t\\tKey:         f.Key,\\n134: \\t\\t\\t\\tName:        f.Name,\\n135: \\t\\t\\t\\tDescription: f.Description,\\n136: \\t\\t\\t\\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\\n137: \\t\\t\\t\\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\\n138: \\t\\t\\t\\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\\n139: \\t\\t\\t\\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\\n140: \\t\\t\\t}\\n141: \\n142: \\t\\t\\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\\n143: \\t\\t\\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\\n144: \\t\\t\\t\\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\\n145: \\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n146: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\\\", f.Key, err)\\n147: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n148: \\n149: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, r := range rules {\\n150: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\\n151: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tId:              r.ID,\\n152: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRank:            r.Rank,\\n153: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\\n154: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n155: \\n156: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\\n157: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\\n158: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\\n159: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\\n160: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n161: \\n162: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\\n163: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\\n164: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\\n165: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n166: \\n167: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\\n168: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\\n169: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\\n170: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\\n171: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\\n172: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsrv.logger.Warn(\\\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\\\", zap.String(\\\"namespace\\\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\\\"flag\\\", f.Key))\\n173: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n174: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n175: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n176: \\n177: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\\n178: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tId:       c.ID,\\n179: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:     typ,\\n180: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tProperty: c.Property,\\n181: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tOperator: c.Operator,\\n182: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tValue:    c.Value,\\n183: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n184: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n185: \\n186: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\\n187: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\\n188: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n189: \\n190: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\\n191: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n192: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\\\", r.ID, err)\\n193: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n194: \\n195: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// distributions for rule\\n196: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, d := range distributions {\\n197: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\\n198: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\\n199: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\\n200: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\\n201: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\\n202: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n203: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\\n204: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n205: \\n206: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\\n207: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n208: \\n209: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n210: \\t\\t\\t}\\n211: \\n212: \\t\\t\\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\\n213: \\t\\t\\t\\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\\n214: \\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n215: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\\\", f.Key, err)\\n216: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n217: \\n218: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\\n219: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\\n220: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\\n221: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tRank: r.Rank,\\n222: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n223: \\n224: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tswitch r.RolloutType {\\n225: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\\n226: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\\n227: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\\n228: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\\n229: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\\n230: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t},\\n231: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n232: \\n233: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\\n234: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\\n235: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\\n236: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\\n237: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n238: \\n239: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\\n240: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\\n241: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\\n242: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif ok {\\n243: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\\n244: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n245: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n246: \\n247: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\\n248: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\\n249: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\\n250: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n251: \\n252: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\\n253: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\\n254: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\\n255: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\\n256: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\\n257: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsrv.logger.Warn(\\\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\\\", zap.String(\\\"namespace\\\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\\\"flag\\\", f.Key))\\n258: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\\n259: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n260: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n261: \\n262: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\\n263: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tId:       c.ID,\\n264: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tType:     typ,\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tProperty: c.Property,\\n266: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tOperator: c.Operator,\\n267: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tValue:    c.Value,\\n268: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n269: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n270: \\n271: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\\n272: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\\n273: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n274: \\n275: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\\n276: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tSegment: segment,\\n277: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n278: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n279: \\n280: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\\n281: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n282: \\t\\t\\t}\\n283: \\n284: \\t\\t\\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\\n285: \\t\\t}\\n286: \\t}\\n287: \\n288: \\treturn resp, nil\\n289: }\\n290: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/data/server.go\"}",

    "content": "1: package data\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"context\"\n5: \t\"fmt\"\n6: \n7: \t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n8: \tgrpc_middleware \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\"\n9: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n10: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n11: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n12: \t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n13: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n14: )\n15: \n16: type EvaluationStore interface {\n17: \tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n18: \tstorage.EvaluationStore\n19: }\n20: \n21: type Server struct {\n22: \tlogger *zap.Logger\n23: \tstore  EvaluationStore\n24: \n25: \tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\n26: }\n27: \n28: func New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\n29: \treturn &Server{\n30: \t\tlogger: logger,\n31: \t\tstore:  store,\n32: \t}\n33: }\n34: \n35: // RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\n36: func (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\n37: \tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\n38: }\n39: \n40: func toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\n41: \tswitch f {\n42: \tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n43: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\n44: \tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n45: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n46: \t}\n47: \treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n48: }\n49: \n50: func toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n51: \tswitch s {\n52: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n53: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n54: \tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n55: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n56: \t}\n57: \treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n58: }\n59: \n60: func toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n61: \tswitch s {\n62: \tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n63: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n64: \tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n65: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n66: \t}\n67: \treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n68: }\n69: \n70: func toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n71: \tswitch c {\n72: \tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n73: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n74: \tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n75: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n76: \tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n77: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n78: \tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n79: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n80: \tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n81: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n82: \t}\n83: \treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n84: }\n85: \n86: func toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\n87: \tswitch r {\n88: \tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n89: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n90: \tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n91: \t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n92: \t}\n93: \treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n94: }\n95: \n96: var supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\"1.38.0\")\n97: \n98: func (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\n99: \tvar (\n100: \t\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\n101: \t\treference    = r.Reference\n102: \t\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\n103: \t\t\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\n104: \t\t\t\tKey: namespaceKey,\n105: \t\t\t},\n106: \t\t\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\n107: \t\t}\n108: \t\tremaining              = true\n109: \t\tnextPage               string\n110: \t\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\n111: \t\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\n112: \t)\n113: \n114: \t//  flags/variants in batches\n115: \tfor remaining {\n116: \t\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\n117: \t\t\tctx,\n118: \t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n119: \t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\n120: \t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\n121: \t\t\t),\n122: \t\t)\n123: \t\tif err != nil {\n124: \t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting flags: %w\", err)\n125: \t\t}\n126: \n127: \t\tflags := res.Results\n128: \t\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\n129: \t\tremaining = nextPage != \"\"\n130: \n131: \t\tfor _, f := range flags {\n132: \t\t\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\n133: \t\t\t\tKey:         f.Key,\n134: \t\t\t\tName:        f.Name,\n135: \t\t\t\tDescription: f.Description,\n136: \t\t\t\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\n137: \t\t\t\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\n138: \t\t\t\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\n139: \t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\n140: \t\t\t}\n141: \n142: \t\t\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\n143: \t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n144: \t\t\t\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\n145: \t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n146: \t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n147: \t\t\t\t}\n148: \n149: \t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rules {\n150: \t\t\t\t\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\n151: \t\t\t\t\t\tId:              r.ID,\n152: \t\t\t\t\t\tRank:            r.Rank,\n153: \t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\n154: \t\t\t\t\t}\n155: \n156: \t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\n157: \t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n158: \t\t\t\t\t\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\n159: \t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n160: \t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n161: \n162: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n163: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n164: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n165: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n166: \n167: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n168: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n169: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n170: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n171: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n172: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n173: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n174: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n175: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n176: \n177: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n178: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n179: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n180: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n181: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n182: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n183: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n184: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n185: \n186: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n187: \t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n188: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n189: \n190: \t\t\t\t\t\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\n191: \t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n192: \t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\", r.ID, err)\n193: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n194: \n195: \t\t\t\t\t\t// distributions for rule\n196: \t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n197: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\n198: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\n199: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\n200: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\n201: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\n202: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n203: \t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\n204: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n205: \n206: \t\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\n207: \t\t\t\t\t}\n208: \n209: \t\t\t\t}\n210: \t\t\t}\n211: \n212: \t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n213: \t\t\t\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\n214: \t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n215: \t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n216: \t\t\t\t}\n217: \n218: \t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\n219: \t\t\t\t\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\n220: \t\t\t\t\t\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\n221: \t\t\t\t\t\tRank: r.Rank,\n222: \t\t\t\t\t}\n223: \n224: \t\t\t\t\tswitch r.RolloutType {\n225: \t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n226: \t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\n227: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\n228: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\n229: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\n230: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n231: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n232: \n233: \t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n234: \t\t\t\t\t\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\n235: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\n236: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\n237: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n238: \n239: \t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\n240: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n241: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\n242: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ok {\n243: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n244: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n245: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n246: \n247: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n248: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n249: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n250: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n251: \n252: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n253: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n254: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n255: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n256: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n257: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n258: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n259: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n260: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n261: \n262: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n263: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n264: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n265: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n266: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n267: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n268: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n269: \t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n270: \n271: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n272: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n273: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n274: \n275: \t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\n276: \t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegment: segment,\n277: \t\t\t\t\t\t}\n278: \t\t\t\t\t}\n279: \n280: \t\t\t\t\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\n281: \t\t\t\t}\n282: \t\t\t}\n283: \n284: \t\t\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\n285: \t\t}\n286: \t}\n287: \n288: \treturn resp, nil\n289: }\n290: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/server/evaluation/data/server.go"
  }

41. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "package data\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\tgrpc_middleware \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n)\n\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tstorage.EvaluationStore\n}\n\ntype Server struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  EvaluationStore\n\n\tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\n}\n\nfunc New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\n\treturn &Server{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\n// RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\nfunc (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\n\tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\n\tswitch f {\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n\tswitch c {\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\n\tswitch r {\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n}\n\nvar supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\"1.38.0\")\n\nfunc (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\n\t\treference    = r.Reference\n\t\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\n\t\t\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\n\t\t\t\tKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\n\t\t}\n\t\tremaining              = true\n\t\tnextPage               string\n\t\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\n\t\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\n\t)\n\n\t//  flags/variants in batches\n\tfor remaining {\n\t\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting flags: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflags := res.Results\n\t\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\n\t\tremaining = nextPage != \"\"\n\n\t\tfor _, f := range flags {\n\t\t\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\n\t\t\t\tKey:         f.Key,\n\t\t\t\tName:        f.Name,\n\t\t\t\tDescription: f.Description,\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(ctx, namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rules {\n\t\t\t\t\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tId:              r.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank:            r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\", r.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// distributions for rule\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\n\t\t\t\t\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank: r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch r.RolloutType {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegment: segment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "file_path": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/data/server.go"
}
Output
{
  "content": "package data\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/blang/semver/v4\"\n\tgrpc_middleware \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n\t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n)\n\ntype EvaluationStore interface {\n\tListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)\n\tstorage.EvaluationStore\n}\n\ntype Server struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  EvaluationStore\n\n\tevaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer\n}\n\nfunc New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {\n\treturn &Server{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\n// RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.\nfunc (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {\n\tevaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {\n\tswitch f {\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {\n\tswitch s {\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c flipt.ComparisonType) evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType {\n\tswitch c {\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_STRING_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_NUMBER_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_DATETIME_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_BOOLEAN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n}\n\nfunc toEvaluationRolloutType(r flipt.RolloutType) evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType {\n\tswitch r {\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n\t}\n\treturn evaluation.EvaluationRolloutType_UNKNOWN_ROLLOUT_TYPE\n}\n\nvar supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion = semver.MustParse(\"1.38.0\")\n\nfunc (srv *Server) EvaluationSnapshotNamespace(ctx context.Context, r *evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshotRequest) (*evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tnamespaceKey = r.Key\n\t\treference    = r.Reference\n\t\tresp         = &evaluation.EvaluationNamespaceSnapshot{\n\t\t\tNamespace: &evaluation.EvaluationNamespace{ // TODO: should we get from store?\n\t\t\t\tKey: namespaceKey,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tFlags: make([]*evaluation.EvaluationFlag, 0),\n\t\t}\n\t\tremaining              = true\n\t\tnextPage               string\n\t\tsegments               = make(map[string]*evaluation.EvaluationSegment)\n\t\tsupportedServerVersion = grpc_middleware.FliptAcceptServerVersionFromContext(ctx)\n\t)\n\n\t//  flags/variants in batches\n\tfor remaining {\n\t\tres, err := srv.store.ListFlags(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tstorage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\t\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespaceKey, storage.WithReference(reference)),\n\t\t\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(nextPage)),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting flags: %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflags := res.Results\n\t\tnextPage = res.NextPageToken\n\t\tremaining = nextPage != \"\"\n\n\t\tfor _, f := range flags {\n\t\t\tflag := &evaluation.EvaluationFlag{\n\t\t\t\tKey:         f.Key,\n\t\t\t\tName:        f.Name,\n\t\t\t\tDescription: f.Description,\n\t\t\t\tEnabled:     f.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\tType:        toEvaluationFlagType(f.Type),\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:   f.CreatedAt,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:   f.UpdatedAt,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tflagKey := storage.NewResource(ctx, namespaceKey, f.Key, storage.WithReference(reference))\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trules, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rules {\n\t\t\t\t\trule := &evaluation.EvaluationRule{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tId:              r.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank:            r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif ss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]; ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss := &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Segments = append(rule.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdistributions, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(r.ID, storage.WithReference(reference)))\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting distributions for rule %q: %w\", r.ID, err)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t// distributions for rule\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tdist := &evaluation.EvaluationDistribution{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantId:         d.VariantID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantKey:        d.VariantKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tVariantAttachment: d.VariantAttachment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tRollout:           d.Rollout,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\trule.Distributions = append(rule.Distributions, dist)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rules = append(flag.Rules, rule)\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif f.Type == flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\trollouts, err := srv.store.GetEvaluationRollouts(ctx, flagKey)\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"getting rollout rules for flag %q: %w\", f.Key, err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\tfor _, r := range rollouts {\n\t\t\t\t\trollout := &evaluation.EvaluationRollout{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tType: toEvaluationRolloutType(r.RolloutType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tRank: r.Rank,\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tswitch r.RolloutType {\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_THRESHOLD_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: r.Threshold.Percentage,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      r.Threshold.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tcase flipt.RolloutType_SEGMENT_ROLLOUT_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment := &evaluation.EvaluationRolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           r.Segment.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: toEvaluationSegmentOperator(r.Segment.SegmentOperator),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, s := range r.Segment.Segments {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// optimization: reuse segment if already seen\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss, ok := segments[s.SegmentKey]\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss = &evaluation.EvaluationSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tKey:       s.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMatchType: toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s.MatchType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tfor _, c := range s.Constraints {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp := toEvaluationConstraintComparisonType(c.Type)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t// see: https://github.com/flipt-io/flipt/pull/2791\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif typ == evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif supportedServerVersion.LT(supportsEntityIdConstraintMinVersion) {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrv.logger.Warn(\"skipping `entity_id` constraint type to support older client; upgrade client to allow `entity_id` constraint type\", zap.String(\"namespace\", f.NamespaceKey), zap.String(\"flag\", f.Key))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\ttyp = evaluation.EvaluationConstraintComparisonType_UNKNOWN_CONSTRAINT_COMPARISON_TYPE\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tss.Constraints = append(ss.Constraints, &evaluation.EvaluationConstraint{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tId:       c.ID,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     typ,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tProperty: c.Property,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOperator: c.Operator,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:    c.Value,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegments[s.SegmentKey] = ss\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsegment.Segments = append(segment.Segments, ss)\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\trollout.Rule = &evaluation.EvaluationRollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tSegment: segment,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\tflag.Rollouts = append(flag.Rollouts, rollout)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tresp.Flags = append(resp.Flags, flag)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n",
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/data/server.go",
  "originalFile": null,
  "structuredPatch": [],
  "type": "create"
}
42. Write @ -
Input
{
  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tfor _, constraint := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tif !e.matchConstraintExpressions(r.Context, constraint) {\n\t\t\t\t// TODO(evanb) add match debug context\n\t\t\t\tgoto next_rule\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor key, variant := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\t// TODO(chriscchapman) return all matching distributions\n\t\t\tif dist, ok := variant[\"default\"]; ok {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = key\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.Value = dist.VariantKey\n\t\t\t\tresp.Attachment = dist.VariantAttachment\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\tnext_rule:\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintExpressions(cxt json.RawMessage, cs flipt.Distribution) bool {\n\tif len(cs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(cxt, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, c := range cs {\n\t\tif !e.matchConstraint(request, c) {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tproperty, ok := ctx[c.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v == \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v == 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn !v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"not_empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v != \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v != 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\tcase string:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintString(v, c)\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintNumber(v, c)\n\tcase bool:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintBoolean(v, c)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintString(value string, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn value == c.Value\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\treturn value != c.Value\n\tcase \"prefix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"suffix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"like\":\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(value, c.Value)\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintNumber(value float64, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value == val\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value != val\n\tcase \"lt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value < val\n\tcase \"lte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value <= val\n\tcase \"gt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value > val\n\tcase \"gte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value >= val\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintBoolean(value bool, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"true\":\n\t\treturn value\n\tcase \"false\":\n\t\treturn !value\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(requestContext json.RawMessage, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, matchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(requestContext, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// add entityId to the request context\n\trequest[\"entityId\"] = entityId\n\n\tif len(constraints) == 0 {\n\t\treturn true, \"no constraints to match\", nil\n\t}\n\n\tmatchedConstraints := 0\n\n\tfor _, constraint := range constraints {\n\t\tvar op string\n\n\t\tswitch constraint.Operator {\n\t\tcase \"IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tcase \"contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\top = constraint.Operator\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch matchType {\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\tmatchedConstraints++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched constraint %q\", constraint.Property), nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tswitch matchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif matchedConstraints == len(constraints) {\n\t\t\tvar properties []string\n\t\t\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\t\t\tproperties = append(properties, c.Property)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(properties)\n\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched all constraints %q\", properties), nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, \"did not match constraints\", nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, constraint storage.EvaluationConstraint, op string) bool {\n\tvalue, ok := ctx[constraint.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tcontextValue := fmt.Sprint(value)\n\n\tswitch op {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn contextValue == constraint.Value\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\treturn contextValue != constraint.Value\n\tcase \"lt\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v < cv\n\tcase \"lte\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v <= cv\n\tcase \"gt\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v > cv\n\tcase \"gte\":\n\t\tv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(contextValue, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\tcv, err := strconv.ParseFloat(constraint.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn v >= cv\n\tcase \"prefix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"suffix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"like\":\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(contextValue, constraint.Value)\n\tcase \"in\":\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(strings.Split(constraint.Value, \",\"), contextValue)\n\tcase \"not_in\":\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(strings.Split(constraint.Value, \",\"), contextValue)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n",

  "content": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tfor _, constraint := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tif !e.matchConstraintExpressions(r.Context, constraint) {\n\t\t\t\t// TODO(evanb) add match debug context\n\t\t\t\tgoto next_rule\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\tfor key, variant := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\t// TODO(chriscchapman) return all matching distributions\n\t\t\tif dist, ok := variant[\"default\"]; ok {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = key\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\tresp.Value = dist.VariantKey\n\t\t\t\tresp.Attachment = dist.VariantAttachment\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\tnext_rule:\n\t}\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintExpressions(cxt json.RawMessage, cs flipt.Distribution) bool {\n\tif len(cs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(cxt, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, c := range cs {\n\t\tif !e.matchConstraint(request, c) {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn true\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tproperty, ok := ctx[c.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v == \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v == 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn !v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == \"not_empty\" {\n\t\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\t\tcase string:\n\t\t\treturn v != \"\"\n\t\tcase float64:\n\t\t\treturn v != 0\n\t\tcase bool:\n\t\t\treturn v\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tswitch v := property.(type) {\n\tcase string:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintString(v, c)\n\tcase float64:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintNumber(v, c)\n\tcase bool:\n\t\treturn e.matchConstraintBoolean(v, c)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintString(value string, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn value == c.Value\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\treturn value != c.Value\n\tcase \"prefix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"suffix\":\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(value, c.Value)\n\tcase \"like\":\n\t\treturn strings.Contains(value, c.Value)\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintNumber(value float64, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value == val\n\tcase \"neq\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value != val\n\tcase \"lt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value < val\n\tcase \"lte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value <= val\n\tcase \"gt\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value > val\n\tcase \"gte\":\n\t\tval, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn value >= val\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraintBoolean(value bool, c *flipt.Constraint) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase \"true\":\n\t\treturn value\n\tcase \"false\":\n\t\treturn !value\n\t}\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(requestContext json.RawMessage, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, matchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tvar request map[string]interface{}\n\tif err := json.Unmarshal(requestContext, &request); err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, \"\", err\n\t}\n\n\t// add entityId to the request context\n\trequest[\"entityId\"] = entityId\n\n\tif len(constraints) == 0 {\n\t\treturn true, \"no constraints to match\", nil\n\t}\n\n\tmatchedConstraints := 0\n\n\tfor _, constraint := range constraints {\n\t\tvar op string\n\n\t\tswitch constraint.Operator {\n\t\tcase \"IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not IPs\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tcase \"contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"in\"\n\t\tcase \"not contains\":\n\t\t\top = \"not_in\"\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\top = constraint.Operator\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch matchType {\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\tmatchedConstraints++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\tif e.matchConstraint(request, constraint, op) {\n\t\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched constraint %q\", constraint.Property), nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tswitch matchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif matchedConstraints == len(constraints) {\n\t\t\tvar properties []string\n\t\t\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\t\t\tproperties = append(properties, c.Property)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tsort.Strings(properties)\n\t\t\treturn true, fmt.Sprintf(\"matched all constraints %q\", properties), nil\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, \"did not match constraints\", nil\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraint(ctx map[string]interface{}, constraint storage.EvaluationConstraint, op string) bool {\n\tvalue, ok := ctx[constraint.Property]\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tcontextValue := fmt.Sprint(value)\n\n\tswitch op {\n\tcase \"eq\":\n\t\treturn contextValue ==     "content": "1: package common\n2: \n3: import (\n4: \t\"bytes\"\n5: \t\"context\"\n6: \t\"database/sql\"\n7: \t\"encoding/base64\"\n8: \t\"encoding/json\"\n9: \t\"errors\"\n10: \t\"fmt\"\n11: \n12: \tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n13: \t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n14: \n15: \terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n16: \t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n17: \tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n18: \tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n19: )\n20: \n21: func compactJSONString(jsonString string) (string, error) {\n22: \tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n23: \tif err := json.Compact(&buf, []byte(jsonString)); err != nil {\n24: \t\treturn \"\", err\n25: \t}\n26: \treturn buf.String(), nil\n27: }\n28: \n29: func emptyAsNil(str string) *string {\n30: \tif str == \"\" {\n31: \t\treturn nil\n32: \t}\n33: \treturn &str\n34: }\n35: \n36: // GetFlag gets a flag with variants by key\n37: func (s *Store) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, p storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n38: \tvar (\n39: \t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n40: \t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n41: \n42: \t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n43: \n44: \t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n45: \t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n46: \t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": p.Key}).\n47: \t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n48: \t\t\tScan(\n49: \t\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n50: \t\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n51: \t\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n52: \t\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n53: \t\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n54: \t\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n55: \t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n56: \t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n57: \t)\n58: \n59: \tif err != nil {\n60: \t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n61: \t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n62: \t\t}\n63: \n64: \t\treturn nil, err\n65: \t}\n66: \n67: \tflag.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n68: \tflag.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n69: \n70: \tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, flag_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n71: \t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n72: \t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": flag.NamespaceKey, \"flag_key\": flag.Key}).\n73: \t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n74: \n75: \trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n76: \tif err != nil {\n77: \t\treturn flag, err\n78: \t}\n79: \n80: \tdefer func() {\n81: \t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n82: \t\t\terr = cerr\n83: \t\t}\n84: \t}()\n85: \n86: \tfor rows.Next() {\n87: \t\tvar (\n88: \t\t\tvariant              flipt.Variant\n89: \t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n90: \t\t\tattachment           sql.NullString\n91: \t\t)\n92: \n93: \t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n94: \t\t\t&variant.Id,\n95: \t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n96: \t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n97: \t\t\t&variant.Key,\n98: \t\t\t&variant.Name,\n99: \t\t\t&variant.Description,\n100: \t\t\t&attachment,\n101: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f@3d5a345f94c2adc8a0eaa102c189c08ad4c0f8e8/-/blob/internal/storage/sql/common/flag.go%3FL1-100"
  }
}
