{
  "filePath": "/workspace/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator.go",
  "newString": "\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "oldString": "\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))",
  "originalFile": "package evaluation\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"hash/crc32\"\n\t\"slices\"\n\t\"sort\"\n\t\"strconv\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute\"\n\t\"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n)\n\n// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.\ntype Evaluator struct {\n\tlogger *zap.Logger\n\tstore  Storer\n}\n\n// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.\nfunc NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {\n\treturn &Evaluator{\n\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\tstore:  store,\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {\n\t// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility\n\t// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.\n\tif int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {\n\t\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"flag type %s invalid\", flag.Type)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tstartTime     = time.Now().UTC()\n\t\tnamespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tflagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)\n\t)\n\n\tmetrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,\n\t\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tmetrics.AttributeType.String(\"variant\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tmetrics.EvaluationErrorsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tmetrics.EvaluationLatency.Record(\n\t\t\tctx,\n\t\t\tfloat64(time.Since(startTime).Nanoseconds())/1e6,\n\t\t\tmetric.WithAttributeSet(\n\t\t\t\tattribute.NewSet(\n\t\t\t\t\tnamespaceAttr,\n\t\t\t\t\tflagAttr,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t)\n\t}()\n\n\tresp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{\n\t\tRequestId:      r.RequestId,\n\t\tEntityId:       r.EntityId,\n\t\tRequestContext: r.Context,\n\t\tFlagKey:        r.FlagKey,\n\t\tNamespaceKey:   r.NamespaceKey,\n\t}\n\n\tif !flag.Enabled {\n\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_DISABLED_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\trules, err := e.store.GetEvaluationRules(ctx, storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, err\n\t}\n\n\tif len(rules) == 0 {\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"no rules match\")\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar lastRank int32\n\n\t// rule loop\n\tfor _, rule := range rules {\n\t\tif rule.Rank < lastRank {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"rule rank: %d detected out of order\", rule.Rank)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlastRank = rule.Rank\n\n\t\tsegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(rule.Segments))\n\t\tsegmentMatches := 0\n\n\t\tfor k, v := range rule.Segments {\n\t\t\tmatched, reason, err := e.matchConstraints(r.Context, v.Constraints, v.MatchType, r.EntityId)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tif matched {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(reason)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentKeys = append(segmentKeys, k)\n\t\t\t\tsegmentMatches++\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tswitch rule.SegmentOperator {\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif segmentMatches < 1 {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ANY segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:\n\t\t\tif len(rule.Segments) != segmentMatches {\n\t\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match ALL segments\")\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// For legacy reasons of supporting SegmentKey.\n\t\t// The old EvaluationResponse will return both the SegmentKey, and SegmentKeys.\n\t\t// If there are multiple segmentKeys, the old EvaluationResponse will take the first value\n\t\t// in the segmentKeys slice.\n\t\tif len(segmentKeys) > 0 {\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKey = segmentKeys[0]\n\t\t\tresp.SegmentKeys = segmentKeys\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tdistributions, err := e.store.GetEvaluationDistributions(ctx, storage.NewID(rule.ID))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvalidDistributions []*storage.EvaluationDistribution\n\t\t\tbuckets            []int\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tfor _, d := range distributions {\n\t\t\t// don't include 0% rollouts\n\t\t\tif d.Rollout > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tvalidDistributions = append(validDistributions, d)\n\n\t\t\t\tif buckets == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := int(d.Rollout * percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tbucket := buckets[len(buckets)-1] + int(d.Rollout*percentMultiplier)\n\t\t\t\t\tbuckets = append(buckets, bucket)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// no distributions for rule\n\t\tif len(validDistributions) == 0 {\n\t\t\te.logger.Info(\"no distributions for rule\")\n\t\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tbucket = crc32Num(r.EntityId, r.FlagKey)\n\t\t\t// sort.SearchInts searches for x in a sorted slice of ints and returns the index\n\t\t\t// as specified by Search. The return value is the index to insert x if x is\n\t\t\t// not present (it could be len(a)).\n\t\t\tindex = sort.SearchInts(buckets, int(bucket)+1)\n\t\t)\n\n\t\t// if index is outside of our existing buckets then it does not match any distribution\n\t\tif index == len(validDistributions) {\n\t\t\tresp.Match = false\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"did not match any distributions\")\n\t\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t\t}\n\n\t\td := validDistributions[index]\n\t\te.logger.Debug(\"matched distribution\", zap.Reflect(\"evaluation_distribution\", d))\n\n\t\tresp.Match = true\n\t\tresp.Value = d.VariantKey\n\t\tresp.Attachment = d.VariantAttachment\n\t\tresp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON\n\t\treturn resp, nil\n\t} // end rule loop\n\n\treturn resp, nil\n}\n\n// matchConstraints is a utility function that will return if all or any constraints have matched for a segment depending\n// on the match type.\nfunc (e *Evaluator) matchConstraints(evalCtx map[string]string, constraints []storage.EvaluationConstraint, segmentMatchType flipt.MatchType, entityId string) (bool, string, error) {\n\tconstraintMatches := 0\n\n\tvar reason string\n\n\tfor _, c := range constraints {\n\t\tv := evalCtx[c.Property]\n\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tmatch bool\n\t\t\terr   error\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tswitch c.Type {\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_STRING_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_NUMBER_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesNumber(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_BOOLEAN_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesBool(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_DATETIME_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch, err = matchesDateTime(c, v)\n\t\tcase flipt.ComparisonType_ENTITY_ID_COMPARISON_TYPE:\n\t\t\tmatch = matchesString(c, entityId)\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\treturn false, reason, errs.ErrInvalid(\"unknown constraint type\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\te.logger.Debug(\"error matching constraint\", zap.String(\"property\", c.Property), zap.Error(err))\n\t\t\t// don't return here because we want to continue to evaluate the other constraints\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif match {\n\t\t\t// increase the matchCount\n\t\t\tconstraintMatches++\n\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// can short circuit here since we had at least one match\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping as we need to match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// no match\n\t\t\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\t\t\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\t\t\t// we can short circuit because we must match all constraints\n\t\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t// keep looping to see if we match the next constraint\n\t\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar matched = true\n\n\tswitch segmentMatchType {\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) != constraintMatches {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ALL constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\n\tcase flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:\n\t\tif len(constraints) > 0 && constraintMatches == 0 {\n\t\t\treason = \"did not match ANY constraints\"\n\t\t\tmatched = false\n\t\t}\n\tdefault:\n\t\treason = fmt.Sprintf(\"unknown match type %d\", segmentMatchType)\n\t\tmatched = false\n\t}\n\n\treturn matched, reason, nil\n}\n\nfunc crc32Num(entityID string, salt string) uint {\n\treturn uint(crc32.ChecksumIEEE([]byte(salt+entityID))) % totalBucketNum\n}\n\nconst (\n\t// totalBucketNum represents how many buckets we can use to determine the consistent hashing\n\t// distribution and rollout\n\ttotalBucketNum uint = 1000\n\n\t// percentMultiplier implies that the multiplier between percentage (100) and totalBucketNum\n\tpercentMultiplier float32 = float32(totalBucketNum) / 100\n)\n\nfunc matchesString(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) bool {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0\n\tcase flipt.OpNotEmpty:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0\n\t}\n\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tvalue := c.Value\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == v\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != v\n\tcase flipt.OpPrefix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasPrefix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpSuffix:\n\t\treturn strings.HasSuffix(strings.TrimSpace(v), value)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, v)\n\tcase flipt.OpIsNotOneOf:\n\t\tvalues := []string{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, v)\n\t}\n\n\treturn false\n}\n\nfunc matchesNumber(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tn, err := strconv.ParseFloat(v, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tif c.Operator == flipt.OpIsOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t} else if c.Operator == flipt.OpIsNotOneOf {\n\t\tvalues := []float64{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(c.Value), &values); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"Invalid value for constraint %q\", c.Value)\n\t\t}\n\t\treturn !slices.Contains(values, n), nil\n\t}\n\n\t// TODO: we should consider parsing this at creation time since it doesn't change and it doesnt make sense to allow invalid constraint values\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseFloat(c.Value, 64)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing number from %q\", c.Value)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value == n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn value != n, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn n < value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn n <= value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn n > value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn n >= value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesBool(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := strconv.ParseBool(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing boolean from %q\", v)\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpTrue:\n\t\treturn value, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpFalse:\n\t\treturn !value, nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc matchesDateTime(c storage.EvaluationConstraint, v string) (bool, error) {\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpNotPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) == 0, nil\n\tcase flipt.OpPresent:\n\t\treturn len(strings.TrimSpace(v)) != 0, nil\n\t}\n\n\t// can't parse an empty string\n\tif v == \"\" {\n\t\treturn false, nil\n\t}\n\n\td, err := tryParseDateTime(v)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tvalue, err := tryParseDateTime(c.Value)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false, err\n\t}\n\n\tswitch c.Operator {\n\tcase flipt.OpEQ:\n\t\treturn value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpNEQ:\n\t\treturn !value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLT:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpLTE:\n\t\treturn d.Before(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGT:\n\t\treturn d.After(value), nil\n\tcase flipt.OpGTE:\n\t\treturn d.After(value) || value.Equal(d), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn false, nil\n}\n\nfunc tryParseDateTime(v string) (time.Time, error) {\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\tif d, err := time.Parse(time.DateOnly, v); err == nil {\n\t\treturn d.UTC(), nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Time{}, errs.ErrInvalidf(\"parsing datetime from %q\", v)\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "package common\n\nimport (\n\t\"bytes\"\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"database/sql\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\nfunc compactJSONString(jsonString string) (string, error) {\n\tvar buf bytes.Buffer\n\tif err := json.Compact(&buf, []byte(jsonString)); err != nil {\n\t\treturn \"\", err\n\t}\n\treturn buf.String(), nil\n}\n\nfunc emptyAsNil(str string) *string {\n\tif str == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\treturn &str\n}\n\n// GetFlag gets a flag with variants by key\nfunc (s *Store) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, p storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": p.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tflag.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tflag.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, flag_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": flag.NamespaceKey, \"flag_key\": flag.Key}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn flag, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant              flipt.Variant\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tattachment           sql.NullString\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&attachment,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvariant.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tvariant.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn flag, err\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvariant.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &variant)\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalVariant struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tKey          sql.NullString\n\tFlagKey      sql.NullString\n\tName         sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tAttachment   sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListFlags lists all flags with variants\nfunc (s *Store) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tflags   []*flipt.Flag\n\t\tresults = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", \\\"type\\\", name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of flags so we can associated variants in second query.\n\tflagsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Flag)\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{}\n\n\t\t\tfCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tfUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&flag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&flag.Key,\n\t\t\t&flag.Type,\n\t\t\t&flag.Name,\n\t\t\t&flag.Description,\n\t\t\t&flag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&fUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tflag.CreatedAt = fCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tflag.UpdatedAt = fUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tflags = append(flags, flag)\n\t\tflagsByKey[flag.Key] = flag\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setVariants(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), flagsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Flag\n\n\tif len(flags) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = flags[len(flags)-1]\n\t\tflags = flags[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = flags\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(flags))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setVariants(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, flagsByKey map[string]*flipt.Flag) error {\n\tallFlagKeys := make([]string, 0, len(flagsByKey))\n\tfor k := range flagsByKey {\n\t\tallFlagKeys = append(allFlagKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"flag_key\": allFlagKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tvariant    optionalVariant\n\t\t\tvCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tvUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&variant.Id,\n\t\t\t&variant.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Key,\n\t\t\t&variant.FlagKey,\n\t\t\t&variant.Name,\n\t\t\t&variant.Description,\n\t\t\t&variant.Attachment,\n\t\t\t&vCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&vUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif flag, ok := flagsByKey[variant.FlagKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tflag.Variants = append(flag.Variants, &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\t\tId:           variant.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: variant.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          variant.Key.String,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tName:         variant.Name.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  variant.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tAttachment:   variant.Attachment.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    vCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    vUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountFlags counts all flags\nfunc (s *Store) CountFlags(ctx context.Context, p storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": p.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateFlag creates a flag\nfunc (s *Store) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow  = flipt.Now()\n\t\tflag = &flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tEnabled:      r.Enabled,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"flags\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"\\\"type\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"enabled\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tflag.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tflag.Key,\n\t\t\tflag.Type,\n\t\t\tflag.Name,\n\t\t\tflag.Description,\n\t\t\tflag.Enabled,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flag.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn flag, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateFlag updates an existing flag\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"flags\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"enabled\", r.Enabled).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"flag %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetFlag(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteFlag deletes a flag\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteFlagRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"flags\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateVariant creates a variant\nfunc (s *Store) CreateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow = flipt.Now()\n\t\tv   = &flipt.Variant{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      r.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tAttachment:   r.Attachment,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tattachment := emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"variants\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"flag_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"attachment\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tv.Id,\n\t\t\tv.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tv.FlagKey,\n\t\t\tv.Key,\n\t\t\tv.Name,\n\t\t\tv.Description,\n\t\t\tattachment,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: v.UpdatedAt},\n\t\t).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif attachment != nil {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(*attachment)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateVariant updates an existing variant\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateVariantRequest) (*flipt.Variant, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\twhereClause := sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"variants\").\n\t\tSet(\"\\\"key\\\"\", r.Key).\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"attachment\", emptyAsNil(r.Attachment)).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause)\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"variant %q\", r.Key)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tattachment sql.NullString\n\t\tcreatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt  fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tv = &flipt.Variant{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", flag_key, name, description, attachment, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&v.Id, &v.NamespaceKey, &v.Key, &v.FlagKey, &v.Name, &v.Description, &attachment, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tv.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tv.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\tif attachment.Valid {\n\t\tcompactedAttachment, err := compactJSONString(attachment.String)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\tv.Attachment = compactedAttachment\n\t}\n\n\treturn v, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteVariant deletes a variant\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteVariant(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteVariantRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"variants\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"flag_key\": r.FlagKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\":   "originalFile": "package common\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"database/sql\"\n\t\"encoding/base64\"\n\t\"encoding/json\"\n\t\"errors\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"strings\"\n\n\tsq \"github.com/Masterminds/squirrel\"\n\t\"github.com/gofrs/uuid\"\n\n\terrs \"go.flipt.io/flipt/errors\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tfliptsql \"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/sql\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n)\n\n// GetSegment gets a segment\nfunc (s *Store) GetSegment(ctx context.Context, req storage.ResourceRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{}\n\n\t\terr = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Namespace(), \"\\\"key\\\"\": req.Key}).\n\t\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\t\tScan(\n\t\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t\t&updatedAt)\n\t)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tif errors.Is(err, sql.ErrNoRows) {\n\t\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", req)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tsegment.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tsegment.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": segment.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": segment.Key}}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at ASC\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn segment, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint           flipt.Constraint\n\t\t\tdescription          sql.NullString\n\t\t\tcreatedAt, updatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&description,\n\t\t\t&createdAt,\n\t\t\t&updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn segment, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tconstraint.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tconstraint.Description = description.String\n\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &constraint)\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, rows.Err()\n}\n\ntype optionalConstraint struct {\n\tId           sql.NullString\n\tNamespaceKey sql.NullString\n\tSegmentKey   sql.NullString\n\tType         sql.NullInt32\n\tProperty     sql.NullString\n\tOperator     sql.NullString\n\tValue        sql.NullString\n\tDescription  sql.NullString\n\tCreatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\tUpdatedAt    fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n}\n\n// ListSegments lists all segments\nfunc (s *Store) ListSegments(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment], error) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tsegments []*flipt.Segment\n\t\tresults  = storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Segment]{}\n\n\t\tquery = s.builder.Select(\"namespace_key, \\\"key\\\", name, description, match_type, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": req.Predicate.Namespace()}).\n\t\t\tOrderBy(fmt.Sprintf(\"created_at %s\", req.QueryParams.Order))\n\t)\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tquery = query.Limit(req.QueryParams.Limit + 1)\n\t}\n\n\tvar offset uint64\n\n\tif req.QueryParams.PageToken != \"\" {\n\t\ttoken, err := decodePageToken(s.logger, req.QueryParams.PageToken)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\toffset = token.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t} else if req.QueryParams.Offset > 0 {\n\t\toffset = req.QueryParams.Offset\n\t\tquery = query.Offset(offset)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// keep track of segments we've seen so we don't append duplicates because of the join\n\tsegmentsByKey := make(map[string]*flipt.Segment)\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tsegment    = &flipt.Segment{}\n\t\t\tsCreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t\tsUpdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&segment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&segment.Key,\n\t\t\t&segment.Name,\n\t\t\t&segment.Description,\n\t\t\t&segment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&sCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&sUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tsegment.CreatedAt = sCreatedAt.Timestamp\n\t\tsegment.UpdatedAt = sUpdatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\t\tsegments = append(segments, segment)\n\t\tsegmentsByKey[segment.Key] = segment\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Close(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.setConstraints(ctx, req.Predicate.Namespace(), segmentsByKey); err != nil {\n\t\treturn results, err\n\t}\n\n\tvar next *flipt.Segment\n\n\tif len(segments) > int(req.QueryParams.Limit) && req.QueryParams.Limit > 0 {\n\t\tnext = segments[len(segments)-1]\n\t\tsegments = segments[:req.QueryParams.Limit]\n\t}\n\n\tresults.Results = segments\n\n\tif next != nil {\n\t\tout, err := json.Marshal(PageToken{Key: next.Key, Offset: offset + uint64(len(segments))})\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn results, fmt.Errorf(\"encoding page token %w\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t\tresults.NextPageToken = base64.StdEncoding.EncodeToString(out)\n\t}\n\n\treturn results, nil\n}\n\nfunc (s *Store) setConstraints(ctx context.Context, namespaceKey string, segmentsByKey map[string]*flipt.Segment) error {\n\tallSegmentKeys := make([]string, 0, len(segmentsByKey))\n\tfor k := range segmentsByKey {\n\t\tallSegmentKeys = append(allSegmentKeys, k)\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": namespaceKey, \"segment_key\": allSegmentKeys}).\n\t\tOrderBy(\"created_at\")\n\n\trows, err := query.QueryContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\tdefer func() {\n\t\tif cerr := rows.Close(); cerr != nil && err == nil {\n\t\t\terr = cerr\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar (\n\t\t\tconstraint optionalConstraint\n\t\t\tcCreatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t\tcUpdatedAt fliptsql.NullableTimestamp\n\t\t)\n\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(\n\t\t\t&constraint.Id,\n\t\t\t&constraint.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Type,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Property,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Operator,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Value,\n\t\t\t&constraint.Description,\n\t\t\t&cCreatedAt,\n\t\t\t&cUpdatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn err\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif segment, ok := segmentsByKey[constraint.SegmentKey.String]; ok {\n\t\t\tsegment.Constraints = append(segment.Constraints, &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\t\tId:           constraint.Id.String,\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: constraint.NamespaceKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:   constraint.SegmentKey.String,\n\t\t\t\tType:         flipt.ComparisonType(constraint.Type.Int32),\n\t\t\t\tProperty:     constraint.Property.String,\n\t\t\t\tOperator:     constraint.Operator.String,\n\t\t\t\tValue:        constraint.Value.String,\n\t\t\t\tDescription:  constraint.Description.String,\n\t\t\t\tCreatedAt:    cCreatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    cUpdatedAt.Timestamp,\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif err := rows.Err(); err != nil {\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\treturn rows.Close()\n}\n\n// CountSegments counts all segments\nfunc (s *Store) CountSegments(ctx context.Context, ns storage.NamespaceRequest) (uint64, error) {\n\tvar count uint64\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"COUNT(*)\").\n\t\tFrom(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": ns.Namespace()}).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&count); err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn count, nil\n}\n\n// CreateSegment creates a segment\nfunc (s *Store) CreateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tnow     = flipt.Now()\n\t\tsegment = &flipt.Segment{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tKey:          r.Key,\n\t\t\tName:         r.Name,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t\tMatchType:    r.MatchType,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"segments\").\n\t\tColumns(\"namespace_key\", \"\\\"key\\\"\", \"name\", \"description\", \"match_type\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tsegment.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tsegment.Key,\n\t\t\tsegment.Name,\n\t\t\tsegment.Description,\n\t\t\tsegment.MatchType,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: segment.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn segment, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateSegment updates an existing segment\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateSegmentRequest) (*flipt.Segment, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tquery := s.builder.Update(\"segments\").\n\t\tSet(\"name\", r.Name).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"match_type\", r.MatchType).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey, \"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key})\n\n\tres, err := query.ExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tp := storage.NewResource(r.NamespaceKey, r.Key)\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"segment %q\", p)\n\t}\n\n\treturn s.GetSegment(ctx, p)\n}\n\n// DeleteSegment deletes a segment\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteSegment(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteSegmentRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"segments\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}, sq.Eq{\"\\\"key\\\"\": r.Key}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// CreateConstraint creates a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) CreateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\toperator = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t\tnow      = flipt.Now()\n\t\tc        = &flipt.Constraint{\n\t\t\tId:           uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tSegmentKey:   r.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tType:         r.Type,\n\t\t\tProperty:     r.Property,\n\t\t\tOperator:     operator,\n\t\t\tValue:        r.Value,\n\t\t\tCreatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tUpdatedAt:    now,\n\t\t\tDescription:  r.Description,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[c.Operator]; ok {\n\t\tc.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tif _, err := s.builder.Insert(\"constraints\").\n\t\tColumns(\"id\", \"namespace_key\", \"segment_key\", \"type\", \"property\", \"operator\", \"value\", \"description\", \"created_at\", \"updated_at\").\n\t\tValues(\n\t\t\tc.Id,\n\t\t\tc.NamespaceKey,\n\t\t\tc.SegmentKey,\n\t\t\tc.Type,\n\t\t\tc.Property,\n\t\t\tc.Operator,\n\t\t\tc.Value,\n\t\t\tc.Description,\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.CreatedAt},\n\t\t\t&fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: c.UpdatedAt}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// UpdateConstraint updates an existing constraint\nfunc (s *Store) UpdateConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.UpdateConstraintRequest) (*flipt.Constraint, error) {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\twhereClause = sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}\n\t\toperator    = strings.ToLower(r.Operator)\n\t)\n\n\t// unset value if operator does not require it\n\tif _, ok := flipt.NoValueOperators[operator]; ok {\n\t\tr.Value = \"\"\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := s.builder.Update(\"constraints\").\n\t\tSet(\"type\", r.Type).\n\t\tSet(\"property\", r.Property).\n\t\tSet(\"operator\", operator).\n\t\tSet(\"value\", r.Value).\n\t\tSet(\"description\", r.Description).\n\t\tSet(\"updated_at\", &fliptsql.Timestamp{Timestamp: flipt.Now()}).\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tcount, err := res.RowsAffected()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tif count != 1 {\n\t\treturn nil, errs.ErrNotFoundf(\"constraint %q\", r.Id)\n\t}\n\n\tvar (\n\t\tcreatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\t\tupdatedAt fliptsql.Timestamp\n\n\t\tc = &flipt.Constraint{}\n\t)\n\n\tif err := s.builder.Select(\"id, namespace_key, segment_key, type, property, operator, value, description, created_at, updated_at\").\n\t\tFrom(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(whereClause).\n\t\tQueryRowContext(ctx).\n\t\tScan(&c.Id, &c.NamespaceKey, &c.SegmentKey, &c.Type, &c.Property, &c.Operator, &c.Value, &c.Description, &createdAt, &updatedAt); err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, err\n\t}\n\n\tc.CreatedAt = createdAt.Timestamp\n\tc.UpdatedAt = updatedAt.Timestamp\n\n\treturn c, nil\n}\n\n// DeleteConstraint deletes a constraint\nfunc (s *Store) DeleteConstraint(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest) error {\n\tif r.NamespaceKey == \"\" {\n\t\tr.NamespaceKey = storage.DefaultNamespace\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.builder.Delete(\"constraints\").\n\t\tWhere(sq.And{sq.Eq{\"id\": r.Id}, sq.Eq{\"segment_key\": r.SegmentKey}, sq.Eq{\"namespace_key\": r.NamespaceKey}}).\n\t\tExecContext(ctx)\n\n\treturn err\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

(\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:     req.Key,\n\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", got.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, true, got.Enabled)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(\"\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Flag{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tKey: \"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, mock.Anything).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListFlags(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListFlagRequest{\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Flags)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey:         \"key\",\n\t\t\tName:        \"name\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"desc\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Flag{\n\t\tKey:         req.Key,\n\t\tName:        req.Name,\n\t\tDescription: req.Description,\n\t\tEnabled:     req.Enabled,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tKey: \"key\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteFlag\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateVariant(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = req.Description,\n\t\tAttachment:  req.Attachment,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateVariant(t &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteConstraintRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteConstraint\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteConstraint(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",

  "originalFile": "//nolint:goconst\npackage server\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/mock\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/common\"\n\t\"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage\"\n\tflipt \"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt\"\n\t\"go.uber.org/zap/zaptest\"\n)\n\nfunc TestGetRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetRuleRequest{Id: \"id\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetRule\", mock.Anything, storage.NewNamespace(\"\"), \"id\").Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId: \"1\",\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.GetRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules_PaginationOffset(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListRules\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Rule{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tdefer store.AssertExpectations(t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"ListRules\", mock.Anything, storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\"),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.ResourceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithPageToken(\"Zm9v\"),\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOffset(10),\n\t\t),\n\t)).Return(\n\t\tstorage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{\n\t\t\tResults: []*flipt.Rule{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\tRank:       1,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:    req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t\tRank:       req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRule_MultipleSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:         \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\tRank:            1,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:              \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:         req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     req.SegmentKeys,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: req.SegmentOperator,\n\t\tRank:            req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:    req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tId: \"id\",\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestOrderRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleIds: []string{\"1\", \"2\"}}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"OrderRules\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.OrderRules(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateDistributionRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleId: \"ruleID\", VariantId: \"variantID\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Distribution{\n\t\tId:        \"1\",\n\t\tRuleId:    req.RuleId,\n\t\tVariantId: req.VariantId,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{Id: \"1\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleId: \"ruleID\", VariantId: \"variantID\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"UpdateDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Distribution{\n\t\tId:        req.Id,\n\t\tRuleId:    req.RuleId,\n\t\tVariantId: req.VariantId,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.UpdateDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestDeleteDistribution(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.DeleteDistributionRequest{Id: \"1\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RuleId: \"ruleID\", VariantId: \"variantID\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"DeleteDistribution\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteDistribution(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",

storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tOffset: 10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore: []*flipt.Rule{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tNextPageToken: \"YmFy\",\n\t\t}, nil)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CountRules\", mock.Anything, storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flagKey\")).Return(uint64(1), nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.ListRules(context.TODO(), &flipt.ListRuleRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\tPageToken: \"Zm9v\",\n\t\tOffset:    10,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, got.Rules)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"YmFy\", got.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.Equal(t, int32(1), got.TotalCount)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:    \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\tRank:       1,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"CreateRule\", mock.Anything, req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:         \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:    req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKey: req.SegmentKey,\n\t\tRank:       req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestCreateRule_MultipleSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\t\tFlagKey:         \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tSegmentKeys: req).Return(&flipt.Rule{\n\t\tId:              \"1\",\n\t\tFlagKey:         req.FlagKey,\n\t\tSegmentKeys:     req.SegmentKeys,\n\t\tSegmentOperator: req.SegmentOperator,\n\t\tRank:            req.Rank,\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.CreateRule(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.GetRolloutRequest{Id: \"id\", FlagKey: \"flagKey\"}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts_PaginationPageToken(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: TestCreateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t)\n\n\tfor _, test := range []struct {\n\t\tname string\n\t\treq  *flipt.CreateRolloutRequest\n\t\tresp *flipt.Rollout\n\t}{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segment\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKey:      \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"segments\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentOperator: flipt.SegmentOperator_AND_SEGMENT_OPERATOR,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tSegmentKeys:     []string{\"segmentKey1\", \"segmentKey2\"},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:           true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tname: \"threshold\",\n\t\t\treq: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tresp: &flipt.Rollout{\n\t\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\t\tRank:    1,\n\t\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Threshold{\n\t\t\t\t\tThreshold: &flipt.RolloutThreshold{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tPercentage: 50.0,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tValue:      true,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t} {\n\t\tt.Run(test.name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tstore.On(\"CreateRollout\", mock.Anything, test.req).Return(test.resp, nil)\n\n\t\t\tgot, err := s.CreateRollout(context.TODO(), test.req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.Equal(t, test.resp, got)\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestUpdateRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.UpdateRolloutRequest{\n\t\t\tId:      \"1\",\n\t\t\tFlagKey: \"flagKey\",\n\t\t\tRule: &flipt.Rollout_Segment{\n\t\t\tSegment: &flipt.RolloutSegment{\n\t\t\t\tSegmentKey: \"segmentKey\",\n\t\t\t\tValue:      false,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}, nil)\n\n\tgot, err := mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.DeleteRollout(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n\nfunc TestOrderRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tvar (\n\t\tstore  = &common.StoreMock{}\n\t\tlogger = zaptest.NewLogger(t)\n\t\ts      = &Server{\n\t\t\tlogger: logger,\n\t\t\tstore:  store,\n\t\t}\n\t\treq = &flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest{FlagKey: \"flagKey\", RolloutIds: []string{\"1\", \"2\"}}\n\t)\n\n\tstore.On(\"OrderRollouts\", mock.Anything, req).Return(nil)\n\n\tgot, err := s.OrderRollouts(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n}\n",
