s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tgot, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, got.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, got.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Name, got.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Description, got.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Enabled, got.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetFlagNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tgot, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, got)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, got.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, got.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Name, got.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Description, got.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Enabled, got.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetFlag_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, \"foo\"))\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag \\\"default/foo\\\" not found\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetFlagNamespace_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(s.namespace, \"foo\"))\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"flag \\\"%s/foo\\\" not found\", s.namespace))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlags() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\t_, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithPageToken(\"Hello World\"))),\n\t)\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"pageToken is not valid: \\\"Hello World\\\"\")\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace)))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotZero(t, len(got))\n\n\tfor _, flag := range got {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(s.namespace)))\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.NotZero(t, len(got))\n\n\tfor _, flag := range got {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.UpdatedAt)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_LimitOffset() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\toldest, middle, newest := reqs[0], reqs[1], reqs[2]\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\t// get middle flag\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get first (newest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get last (oldest) flag\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1), storage.WithOffset(2),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\t// get all flags\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_LimitWithNextPage() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t},\n\t\t{\n\t\t\tKey:         uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\tif s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t}\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t}\n\n\toldest, middle, newest := reqs[0], reqs[1], reqs[2]\n\n\t// TODO: the ordering (DESC) is required because the default ordering is ASC and we are not clearing the DB between tests\n\t// get newest flag\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](storage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(1)),\n\t)\n\tres, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot := res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.NotEmpty(t, res.NextPageToken)\n\n\tpageToken := &common.PageToken{}\n\tpTokenB, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the middle flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get middle flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\tpTokenB, err = base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(res.NextPageToken)\n\tassert.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = json.Unmarshal(pTokenB, pageToken)\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t// next page should be the oldest flag\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, pageToken.Key)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, pageToken.Offset)\n\n\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 1\n\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = res.NextPageToken\n\n\t// get oldest flag\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 1)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\n\treq = storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithOrder(storage.OrderDesc), storage.WithLimit(3),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\t// get all flags\n\tres, err = s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tgot = res.Results\n\tassert.Len(t, got, 3)\n\tassert.Equal(t, newest.Key, got[0].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, middle.Key, got[1].Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, oldest.Key, got[2].Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestListFlagsPagination_FullWalk() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tnamespace := uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String()\n\n\tctx := context.Background()\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{\n\t\tKey: namespace,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tvar (\n\t\ttotalFlags = 9\n\t\tpageSize   = uint64(3)\n\t)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\treq := flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(ctx, &req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < 2; i++ {\n\t\t\tif i > 0 && s.db.Driver == fliptsql.MySQL {\n\t\t\t\t// required for MySQL since it only s.stores timestamps to the second and not millisecond granularity\n\t\t\t\ttime.Sleep(time.Second)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(ctx, &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\t\tFlagKey:      req.Key,\n\t\t\t\tKey:          fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t})\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewNamespace(namespace),\n\t\tstorage.ListWithQueryParamOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](\n\t\t\tstorage.WithLimit(pageSize),\n\t\t),\n\t)\n\tresp, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tfound := resp.Results\n\tfor token := resp.NextPageToken; token != \"\"; token = resp.NextPageToken {\n\t\treq.QueryParams.PageToken = token\n\t\tresp, err = s.store.ListFlags(ctx, req)\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t\tfound = append(found, resp.Results...)\n\t}\n\n\trequire.Len(t, found, totalFlags)\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < totalFlags; i++ {\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].NamespaceKey)\n\n\t\texpectedFlag := fmt.Sprintf(\"flag_%03d\", i)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", found[i].Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", found[i].Description)\n\n\t\trequire.Len(t, found[i].Variants, 2)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[0].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[0].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_0\", found[i].Variants[0].Key)\n\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, found[i].Variants[1].NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, expectedFlag, found[i].Variants[1].FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"variant_1\", found[i].Variants[1].Key)\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), flag.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", flag.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", flag.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.CreatedAt.Seconds, flag.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateFlagNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), flag.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", flag.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", flag.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.CreatedAt.Seconds, flag.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateFlag_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag \\\"default/TestDBTestSuite/TestCreateFlag_DuplicateKey\\\" is not unique\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateFlagNamespace_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"flag \\\"%s/%s\\\" is not unique\", s.namespace, t.Name()))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), flag.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", flag.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", flag.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.CreatedAt.Seconds, flag.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         flag.Key,\n\t\tName:        flag.Name,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, updated.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Name, updated.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateFlagNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, flag.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), flag.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", flag.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", flag.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, flag.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.CreatedAt.Seconds, flag.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          flag.Key,\n\t\tName:         flag.Name,\n\t\tDescription:  \"foobar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, updated.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Name, updated.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.True(t, flag.Enabled)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateFlag_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag \\\"default/foo\\\" not found\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateFlagNamespace_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.UpdateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"flag \\\"%s/foo\\\" not found\", s.namespace))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{Key: flag.Key})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteFlagNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteFlag_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\terr := s.store.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{Key: \"foo\"})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteFlagNamespace_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\terr := s.store.DeleteFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariantNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:   attachment,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant_FlagNotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     \"foo\",\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"flag \\\"default/foo\\\" not found\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariantNamespace_FlagNotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t_, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      \"foo\",\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"flag \\\"%s/foo\\\" not found\", s.namespace))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\t// try to create another variant with the same name for this flag\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"variant \\\"foo\\\" is not unique for flag \\\"default/TestDBTestSuite/TestCreateVariant_DuplicateKey\\\"\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariantNamespace_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\t// try to create another variant with the same name for this flag\n\t_, err = s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"variant \\\"foo\\\" is not unique for flag \\\"%s/%s\\\"\", s.namespace, t.Name()))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariant_DuplicateKey_DifferentFlag() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag1, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s_1\", t.Name()),\n\t\tName:        \"foo_1\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag1)\n\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag1.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant1)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant1.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag1.Key, variant1.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant1.Key)\n\n\tflag2, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         fmt.Sprintf(\"%s_2\", t.Name()),\n\t\tName:        \"foo_2\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag2)\n\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag2.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant2)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant2.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag2.Key, variant2.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant2.Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestCreateVariantNamespace_DuplicateFlag_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag1, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag1)\n\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag1.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant1)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant1.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, variant1.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag1.Key, variant1.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant1.Key)\n\n\tflag2, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag2)\n\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag2.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant2)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant2.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant2.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag2.Key, variant2.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant2.Key)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestGetFlagWithVariantsMultiNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tfor _, namespace := range []string{storage.DefaultNamespace, s.namespace} {\n\t\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t\tattachment := `{\"key\":\"value\"}`\n\t\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\tNamespaceKey: namespace,\n\t\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\t\tAttachment:   attachment,\n\t\t})\n\n\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, namespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, attachment, variant.Attachment)\n\t\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\t\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\t}\n\n\t// get the default namespaced flag\n\tflag, err := s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, t.Name()))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n\n\tvariant := flag.Variants[0]\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, t.Name(), variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value\"}`, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment1 := `{\"key\":\"value1\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  attachment1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment1, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:          variant.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     variant.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         variant.Key,\n\t\tName:        variant.Name,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t\tAttachment:  `{\"key\":      \"value2\"}`,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, storage.DefaultNamespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Key, updated.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Name, updated.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value2\"}`, updated.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariantNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tattachment1 := `{\"key\":\"value1\"}`\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tAttachment:   attachment1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, variant.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, flag.Key, variant.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foo\", variant.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"bar\", variant.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, attachment1, variant.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, variant.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.CreatedAt.Seconds, variant.UpdatedAt.Seconds)\n\n\tupdated, err := s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tId:           variant.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:          variant.Key,\n\t\tName:         variant.Name,\n\t\tDescription:  \"foobar\",\n\t\tAttachment:   `{\"key\":      \"value2\"}`,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Id, updated.Id)\n\tassert.Equal(t, s.namespace, updated.NamespaceKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.FlagKey, updated.FlagKey)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Key, updated.Key)\n\tassert.Equal(t, variant.Name, updated.Name)\n\tassert.Equal(t, \"foobar\", updated.Description)\n\tassert.Equal(t, `{\"key\":\"value2\"}`, updated.Attachment)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.CreatedAt)\n\tassert.NotZero(t, updated.UpdatedAt)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Len(t, flag.Variants, 1)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariant_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:          \"foo\",\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"variant \\\"foo\\\" not found\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariantNamespace_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tId:           \"foo\",\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"variant \\\"foo\\\" not found\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariant_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant1)\n\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"bar\",\n\t\tName:        \"bar\",\n\t\tDescription: \"baz\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant2)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:          variant2.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:     variant2.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:         variant1.Key,\n\t\tName:        variant2.Name,\n\t\tDescription: \"foobar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"variant \\\"foo\\\" is not unique for flag \\\"default/TestDBTestSuite/TestUpdateVariant_DuplicateKey\\\"\")\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestUpdateVariantNamespace_DuplicateKey() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant1, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant1)\n\n\tvariant2, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"bar\",\n\t\tName:         \"bar\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"baz\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant2)\n\n\t_, err = s.store.UpdateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.UpdateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tId:           variant2.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey:      variant2.FlagKey,\n\t\tKey:          variant1.Key,\n\t\tName:         variant2.Name,\n\t\tDescription:  \"foobar\",\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, fmt.Sprintf(\"variant \\\"foo\\\" is not unique for flag \\\"%s/%s\\\"\", s.namespace, t.Name()))\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteVariant() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{FlagKey: variant.FlagKey, Id: variant.Id})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(storage.DefaultNamespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Empty(t, flag.Variants)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteVariantNamespace() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:          \"foo\",\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tFlagKey:      variant.FlagKey,\n\t\tId:           variant.Id,\n\t})\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\t// get the flag again\n\tflag, err = s.store.GetFlag(context.TODO(), storage.NewResource(s.namespace, flag.Key))\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tassert.Empty(t, flag.Variants)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteVariant_ExistingRule() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\t// TODO\n\tt.SkipNow()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\tvariant, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:     flag.Key,\n\t\tKey:         \"foo\",\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, variant)\n\n\tsegment, err := s.store.CreateSegment(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateSegmentRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, segment)\n\n\trule, err := s.store.CreateRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateRuleRequest{\n\t\tFlagKey:    flag.Key,\n\t\tSegmentKey: segment.Key,\n\t\tRank:       1,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, rule)\n\n\t// try to delete variant with attached rule\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:      variant.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\tassert.EqualError(t, err, \"atleast one rule exists that includes this variant\")\n\n\t// delete the rule, then try to delete the variant again\n\terr = s.store.DeleteRule(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteRuleRequest{\n\t\tId:      rule.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:      variant.Id,\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteVariant_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tKey:         t.Name(),\n\t\tName:        \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription: \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:     true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\tId:      \"foo\",\n\t\tFlagKey: flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc (s *DBTestSuite) TestDeleteVariantNamespace_NotFound() {\n\tt := s.T()\n\n\tflag, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tKey:          t.Name(),\n\t\tName:         \"foo\",\n\t\tDescription:  \"bar\",\n\t\tEnabled:      true,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\tassert.NotNil(t, flag)\n\n\terr = s.store.DeleteVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.DeleteVariantRequest{\n\t\tNamespaceKey: s.namespace,\n\t\tId:           \"foo\",\n\t\tFlagKey:      flag.Key,\n\t})\n\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc BenchmarkListFlags(b *testing.B) {\n\ts := new(DBTestSuite)\n\tt := &testing.T{}\n\ts.SetT(t)\n\ts.SetupSuite()\n\n\tfor i := 0; i < 1000; i++ {\n\t\treqs := []*flipt.CreateFlagRequest{\n\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\tKey:     uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"foo_%d\", i),\n\t\t\t\tEnabled: true,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tfor _, req := range reqs {\n\t\t\tf, err := s.store.CreateFlag(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, f)\n\n\t\t\tfor j := 0; j < 10; j++ {\n\t\t\t\tv, err := s.store.CreateVariant(context.TODO(), &flipt.CreateVariantRequest{\n\t\t\t\t\tFlagKey: f.Key,\n\t\t\t\t\tKey:     uuid.Must(uuid.NewV4()).String(),\n\t\t\t\t\tName:    fmt.Sprintf(\"variant_%d\", j),\n\t\t\t\t})\n\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tassert.NotNil(t, v)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tb.ResetTimer()\n\n\treq := storage.ListWithOptions(storage.NewNamespace(storage.DefaultNamespace))\n\tb.Run(\"no-pagination\", func(b *testing.B) {\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < b.N; i++ {\n\t\t\tflags, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, flags)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\tfor _, pageSize := range []uint64{10, 25, 100, 500} {\n\t\treq := req\n\t\treq.QueryParams.Limit = pageSize\n\t\tb.Run(fmt.Sprintf(\"pagination-limit-%d\", pageSize), func(b *testing.B) {\n\t\t\tfor i := 0; i < b.N; i++ {\n\t\t\t\tflags, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, flags)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\tb.Run(\"pagination\", func(b *testing.B) {\n\t\treq := req\n\t\treq.QueryParams.Limit = 500\n\t\treq.QueryParams.Offset = 50\n\t\treq.QueryParams.Order = storage.OrderDesc\n\t\tfor i := 0; i < b.N; i++ {\n\t\t\tflags, err := s.store.ListFlags(context.TODO(), req)\n\t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n\t\t\tassert.NotEmpty(t, flags)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\n\ts.TearDownSuite()\n}\n",

&common.StoreMock{},\n\t}\n}\n\n// View accepts a function which takes a *StoreSnapshot.\n// The SnapshotStore will supply a snapshot which is valid\n// for the lifetime of the provided function call.\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) View(_ context.Context, _ storage.Reference, fn func(storage.ReadOnlyStore) error) error {\n\treturn fn(s.StoreMock)\n}\n\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) String() string TestGetFlag(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tresource := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"foo\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetFlag\", mock.Anything, resource).Return(&flipt.Flag{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetFlag(context.TODO(), resource)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions[storage.NamespaceRequest](ns)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListFlags\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListFlags(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountFlags(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountFlags\", mock.Anything, defaultNS).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountFlags(context.TODO(), defaultNS)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRule(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNS := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRule\", mock.Anything, defaultNS, \"rule\").Return(&flipt.Rule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRule(context.TODO(), defaultNS, \"rule\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(context.TODO(), \"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetSegment(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tsegment := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"segment\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetSegment\", mock.Anything, segment).Return(&flipt.Segment{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetSegment(context.TODO(), segment)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListSegments(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := defaultNs)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetRollout(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tdefaultNs := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetRollout\", mock.Anything, defaultNs, \"rollout\").Return(&flipt.Rollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetRollout(context.TODO(), defaultNs, \"rollout\")\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlistByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\"),\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListRollouts\", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rollout]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListRollouts(context.TODO(), listByDefault)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetNamespace(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tns := storage.NewNamespace(\"\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetNamespace\", mock.Anything, ns).Return(&flipt.Namespace{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetNamespace(context.TODO(), ns)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestListNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tlist := storage.ListWithOptions(\n\t\tstorage.ReferenceRequest{},\n\t)\n\tstoreMock.On(\"ListNamespaces\", mock.Anything, list).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Namespace]{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.ListNamespaces(context.TODO(), list)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestCountNamespaces(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tref := storage.ReferenceRequest{}\n\tstoreMock.On(\"CountNamespaces\", mock.Anything, ref).Return(uint64(0), nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.CountNamespaces(context.TODO(), ref)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRules(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRules\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRule{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRules(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationDistributions(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tid := storage.NewID(\"id\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationDistributions\", mock.Anything, id).Return([]*storage.EvaluationDistribution{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationDistributions(context.TODO(), id)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\nfunc TestGetEvaluationRollouts(t *testing.T) {\n\tstoreMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()\n\tss := NewStore(storeMock)\n\n\tflag := storage.NewResource(\"\", \"flag\")\n\tstoreMock.On(\"GetEvaluationRollouts\", mock.Anything, flag).Return([]*storage.EvaluationRollout{}, nil)\n\n\t_, err := ss.GetEvaluationRollouts(context.TODO(), flag)\n\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n}\n\ntype snapshotStoreMock struct {\n\t*common.StoreMock\n}\n\nfunc newSnapshotStoreMock() snapshotStoreMock {\n\treturn snapshotStoreMock{\n\t\tStoreMock: &common.StoreMock{},\n\t}\n}\n\n// View accepts a function which takes a *StoreSnapshot.\n// The SnapshotStore will supply a snapshot which is valid\n// for the lifetime of the provided function call.\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) View(_ context.Context, _ storage.Reference, fn func(storage.ReadOnlyStore) error) error {\n\treturn fn(s.StoreMock)\n}\n\nfunc (s snapshotStoreMock) String() string {\n\treturn \"mock\"\n}\n",

package storage

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"
	"path"

	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/containers"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
)

const (
	// DefaultListLimit is the default limit applied to any list operation page size when one is not provided.
	DefaultListLimit uint64 = 25

	// MaxListLimit is the upper limit applied to any list operation page size.
	MaxListLimit uint64 = 100
)

// EvaluationRule represents a rule and constraints required for evaluating if a
// given flagKey matches a segment
type EvaluationRule struct {
	ID              string                        `json:"id,omitempty"`
	NamespaceKey    string                        `json:"namespace_key,omitempty"`
	FlagKey         string                        `json:"flag_key,omitempty"`
	Segments        map[string]*EvaluationSegment `json:"segments,omitempty"`
	Rank            int32                         `json:"rank,omitempty"`
	SegmentOperator flipt.SegmentOperator         `json:"segmentOperator,omitempty"`
}

type EvaluationSegment struct {
	SegmentKey  string                 `json:"segment_key,omitempty"`
	MatchType   flipt.MatchType        `json:"match_type,omitempty"`
	Constraints []EvaluationConstraint `json:"constraints,omitempty"`
}

// EvaluationRollout represents a rollout in the form that helps with evaluation.
type EvaluationRollout struct {
	NamespaceKey string            `json:"namespace_key,omitempty"`
	RolloutType  flipt.RolloutType `json:"rollout_type,omitempty"`
	Rank         int32             `json:"rank,omitempty"`
	Threshold    *RolloutThreshold `json:"threshold,omitempty"`
	Segment      *RolloutSegment   `json:"segment,omitempty"`
}

// RolloutThreshold represents Percentage(s) for use in evaluation.
type RolloutThreshold struct {
	Percentage float32 `json:"percentage,omitempty"`
	Value      
... (truncated)

import (
	"context"

// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.
// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.
func (s *Server) Variant(ctx context.Context, r *rpcevaluation.EvaluationRequest) (*rpcevaluation.VariantEvaluationResponse, error) {
	flag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	s.logger.Debug("variant", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	resp, err := s.variant(ctx, flag, r)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	spanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{
		fliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),
		fliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),
		fliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),
		fliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.VariantKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),
		fliptotel.AttributeSegments.StringSlice(resp.SegmentKeys),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(resp.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeProviderName,
		fliptotel.AttributeFlagVariant(resp.VariantKey),
	}

	// add otel attributes to span
	span := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)
	span.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)

	s.logger.Debug("variant", zap.Stringer("respon

3. WRITE /workspace/internal/server/evaluator.go
package server

import (
	"context"
	"errors"

	errs "go.flipt.io/flipt/errors"
	fliptotel "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	flipt "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

// Evaluate evaluates a request for a given flag and entity
func (s *Server) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.EvaluationRequest) (*flipt.EvaluationResponse, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("evaluate", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	flag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey))
	if err != nil {
		var resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}
		resp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON

		var errnf errs.ErrNotFound
		if errors.As(err, &errnf) {
			resp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_FLAG_NOT_FOUND_EVALUATION_REASON
		}

		return resp, err
	}

	resp, err := s.evaluator.Evaluate(ctx, flag, &evaluation.EvaluationRequest{
		RequestId:    r.RequestId,
		FlagKey:      r.FlagKey,
		EntityId:     r.EntityId,
		Context:      r.Context,
		NamespaceKey: r.NamespaceKey,
	})
	if err != nil {
		return resp, err
	}

	spanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{
		fliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeEntityID.String(r.EntityId),
		fliptotel.AttributeRequestID.String(r.RequestId),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlagKey(r.FlagKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeProviderName,
	}

	if resp != nil {
		spanAttrs = append(spanAttrs,
			fliptotel.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),
			fliptotel.AttributeSegment.String(resp.SegmentKey),
			fliptotel.AttributeValue.String(resp.Value),
			fliptotel.AttributeReason.String(resp.Reason.String()),
			fliptotel.Attri
... (truncated)
4. WRITE /workspace/internal/server/flag.go
package server

import (
	"context"

	fliptotel "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/otel"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	flipt "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/trace"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
	empty "google.golang.org/protobuf/types/known/emptypb"
)

// GetFlag gets a flag
func (s *Server) GetFlag(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetFlagRequest) (*flipt.Flag, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("get flag", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	flag, err := s.store.GetFlag(ctx, storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.Key, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)))

	spanAttrs := []attribute.KeyValue{
		fliptotel.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey),
		fliptotel.AttributeFlag.String(r.Key),
	}

	if flag != nil {
		spanAttrs = append(spanAttrs, fliptotel.AttributeFlagEnabled.Bool(flag.Enabled))
	}

	// add otel attributes to span
	span := trace.SpanFromContext(ctx)
	span.SetAttributes(spanAttrs...)

	s.logger.Debug("get flag", zap.Stringer("response", flag))
	return flag, err
}

// ListFlags lists all flags
func (s *Server) ListFlags(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListFlagRequest) (*flipt.FlagList, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("list flags", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	ns := storage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.GetReference()))
	results, err := s.store.ListFlags(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(ns, r))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	resp := flipt.FlagList{
		Flags: results.Results,
	}

	total, err := s.store.CountFlags(ctx, ns)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	resp.TotalCount = int32(total)
	resp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken

	s.logger.Debug("list flags", zap.Stringer("response", &resp))
	return &resp, nil
}

// CreateFlag creates a flag
func (s *Server) CreateFlag(ctx context.Context, r
... (truncated)

package server

import (
	"context"

	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	flipt "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	"go.uber.org/zap"

)

// GetRule gets a rule
func (s *Server) GetRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.GetRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("get rule", zap.Stringer("request", r))
	rule, err := s.store.GetRule(ctx,
		storage.NewNamespace(r.NamespaceKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference)),
		r.Id)
	s.logger.Debug("get rule", zap.Stringer("response", rule))
	return rule, err
}

// ListRules lists all rules for a flag
func (s *Server) ListRules(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.ListRuleRequest) (*flipt.RuleList, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("list rules", zap.Stringer("request", r))

	flag := storage.NewResource(ctx, r.NamespaceKey, r.FlagKey, storage.WithReference(r.Reference))
	results, err := s.store.ListRules(ctx, storage.ListWithParameters(flag, r))
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	resp := flipt.RuleList{
		Rules: results.Results,
	}

	total, err := s.store.CountRules(ctx, flag)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	resp.TotalCount = int32(total)
	resp.NextPageToken = results.NextPageToken

	s.logger.Debug("list rules", zap.Stringer("response", &resp))
	return &resp, nil
}

// CreateRule creates a rule
func (s *Server) CreateRule(ctx context.Context, r *flipt.CreateRuleRequest) (*flipt.Rule, error) {
	s.logger.Debug("create rule", zap.Stringer("request", r))
	rule, err := s.store.CreateRule(ctx, r)
	s.logger.Debug("create rule", zap.Stringer("response", rule))
	return rule, err
}

package data

import (
	"context"
	"fmt"

	"github.com/blang/semver/v4"
	grpc_middleware "go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/middleware/grpc"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
	"google.golang.org/grpc"
)

type EvaluationStore interface {
	ListFlags(ctx context.Context, req *storage.ListRequest[storage.NamespaceRequest]) (storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Flag], error)
	storage.EvaluationStore
}

type Server struct {
	logger *zap.Logger
	store  EvaluationStore

	evaluation.UnimplementedDataServiceServer
}

func New(logger *zap.Logger, store EvaluationStore) *Server {
	return &Server{
		logger: logger,
		store:  store,
	}
}

// RegisterGRPC registers the *Server onto the provided grpc Server.
func (srv *Server) RegisterGRPC(server *grpc.Server) {
	evaluation.RegisterDataServiceServer(server, srv)
}

func toEvaluationFlagType(f flipt.FlagType) evaluation.EvaluationFlagType {
	switch f {
	case flipt.FlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE:
		return evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_BOOLEAN_FLAG_TYPE
	case flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE:
		return evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE
	}
	return evaluation.EvaluationFlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE
}

func toEvaluationSegmentMatchType(s flipt.MatchType) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType {
	switch s {
	case flipt.MatchType_ANY_MATCH_TYPE:
		return evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE
	case flipt.MatchType_ALL_MATCH_TYPE:
		return evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ALL_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE
	}
	return evaluation.EvaluationSegmentMatchType_ANY_SEGMENT_MATCH_TYPE
}

func toEvaluationSegmentOperator(s flipt.SegmentOperator) evaluation.EvaluationSegmentOperator {
	switch s {
	case flipt.SegmentOperator_OR_SEGMENT_OPERATOR:
		retur
... (truncated)

package evaluation

import (
	"context"
	"encoding/json"
	"fmt"
	"hash/crc32"
	"slices"
	"sort"
	"strconv"
	"strings"
	"time"

	errs "go.flipt.io/flipt/errors"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/server/metrics"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/evaluation"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/attribute"
	"go.opentelemetry.io/otel/metric"
	"go.uber.org/zap"
)

// Evaluator is an evaluator for legacy flag evaluations.
type Evaluator struct {
	logger *zap.Logger
	store  Storer
}

// NewEvaluator is the constructor for an Evaluator.
func NewEvaluator(logger *zap.Logger, store Storer) *Evaluator {
	return &Evaluator{
		logger: logger,
		store:  store,
	}
}

func (e *Evaluator) Evaluate(ctx context.Context, flag *flipt.Flag, r *evaluation.EvaluationRequest) (resp *flipt.EvaluationResponse, err error) {
	// Flag should be of variant type by default. However, for maximum backwards compatibility
	// on this layer, we will check against the integer value of the flag type.
	if int(flag.Type) != 0 || flag.Type != flipt.FlagType_VARIANT_FLAG_TYPE {
		resp = &flipt.EvaluationResponse{}
		resp.Reason = flipt.EvaluationReason_ERROR_EVALUATION_REASON
		return resp, errs.ErrInvalidf("flag type %s invalid", flag.Type)
	}

	var (
		startTime     = time.Now().UTC()
		namespaceAttr = metrics.AttributeNamespace.String(r.NamespaceKey)
		flagAttr      = metrics.AttributeFlag.String(r.FlagKey)
	)

	metrics.EvaluationsTotal.Add(ctx, 1, metric.WithAttributeSet(attribute.NewSet(namespaceAttr, flagAttr)))

	defer func() {
		if err == nil {
			metrics.EvaluationResultsTotal.Add(ctx, 1,
				metric.WithAttributeSet(
					attribute.NewSet(
						namespaceAttr,
						flagAttr,
						metrics.AttributeMatch.Bool(resp.Match),
						metrics.AttributeSegment.St
... (truncated)
10. EDIT /workspace/internal/storage/storage.go
Before
// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.
// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.
func NewResource(ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {
	p := ResourceRequest{
		NamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{
			key: ns,
		},
		Key: key,
	}

	containers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)

	return p
}
After
// NewResource constructs and configures and new *ResourceRequest from the provided namespace and resource keys.
// Optionally, the target storage revision reference can also be supplied.
func NewResource(ctx context.Context, ns, key string, opts ...containers.Option[ReferenceRequest]) ResourceRequest {
	p := ResourceRequest{
		NamespaceRequest: NamespaceRequest{
			key: ns,
		},
		Key: key,
	}

	containers.ApplyAll(&p.ReferenceRequest, opts...)

	return p
}

After
// Variant evaluates a request for a multi-variate flag and entity.
// It adapts the 'v2' evaluation API and proxies the request to the 'v1' evaluation API.

func TestCountRules(t *testing.T) {
	storeMock := newSnapshotStoreMock()
	ss := NewStore(storeMock)

	flag := storage.NewResource("", "flag")
After
	listByDefault := storage.ListWithOptions(
		storage.NewResource(context.TODO(), "", "flag"),
	)
	storeMock.On("ListRules", mock.Anything, listByDefault).Return(storage.ResultSet[*flipt.Rule]{}, nil)

	_, err := ss.ListRules(context.TODO(), listByDefault)
	require.NoError(t, err)
}

        Bash Commands (20)
        
1. $ find . -name storage.go -path "*/internal/storage/*" | head -5
2. $ pwd && ls -la
3. $ mkdir -p /workspace/internal/storage /workspace/internal/server /workspace/internal/server/evaluation /workspace/internal/server/evaluation/data /workspace/internal/storage/sql/common
4. $ go build -v ./internal/storage/storage.go 2>&1 | head -100
5. $ git config --get remote.origin.url
6. $ find . -name "go.mod" 2>/dev/null | head -5
7. $ git log --oneline -1
8. $ find . -type f | head -20
9. $ cd /tmp && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sg-evals/flipt--3d5a345f.git flipt-repo 2>&1 | tail -20
10. $ cp -r /tmp/flipt-repo/* /workspace/ && ls -la /workspace/ | head -20
11. $ go build ./internal/... 2>&1 | head -100
12. $ go build ./internal/... 2>&1 | tail -50
13. $ timeout 120 go build ./internal/... 2>&1 | tail -30
14. $ go vet ./internal/storage/storage.go 2>&1 | head -20
15. $ go fmt ./internal/storage/storage.go && echo "storage.go formatted successfully"
16. $ go fmt ./internal/server/flag.go ./internal/server/rule.go ./internal/server/segment.go ./internal/server/evaluator.go && echo "All files formatted successfully"
17. $ go build -v ./internal/storage 2>&1
18. $ go build -v ./internal/server 2>&1 | head -50
19. $ timeout 180 go build -v ./internal/... 2>&1 | grep -E "^(go|go.flipt|#|[a-z])" | head -50
20. $ go build ./internal/... && echo "Build successful! All files compiled without errors."
